or.explanation: ରାଲ୍ଫ ଟାଇଲର୍‌ଙ୍କ ଅବରୋହୀ (deductive) ମଡେଲ୍ ଯାହା ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୁଏ, ତାହା ବିପରୀତରେ ହିଲ୍ଡା ଟାବା ଏକ ଆରୋହୀ (inductive/Grassroots) ଆଭିମୁଖ୍ୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ କରିଥିଲେ ଯାହା ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଣୟନ କରିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ନିରୂପଣରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥାଏ।

questions.question: In Chapter XIII of 'Biographia Literaria', Samuel Taylor Coleridge defines 'Primary Imagination' as which of the following?
options: the living Power and prime Agent of all human Perception, and as a repetition in the finite mind of the eternal act of creation in the infinite I AM
an echo of the former, co-existing with the conscious will, yet still as identical with the primary in the kind of its agency
no other than a mode of Memory emancipated from the order of time and space, blended with, and modified by that empirical phenomenon of the will
the faculty that dissolves, diffuses, dissipates, in order to re-create, struggling to idealize and to unify
questions.explanation: Coleridge defines the Primary Imagination in Chapter XIII of 'Biographia Literaria' as the living power and prime agent of all human perception, serving as a finite reflection of the divine creative act ('infinite I AM'). The other choices describe the Secondary Imagination (options B and D) or Fancy (option C).

or.question: 'Biographia Literaria' ର ତ୍ରୟୋଦଶ ଅଧ୍ୟାୟ (Chapter XIII) ରେ, ସାମୁଏଲ୍ ଟେଲର୍ କୋଲରିଜ୍ 'ପ୍ରାଥମିକ କଳ୍ପନାଶକ୍ତି' (Primary Imagination) କୁ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ଭାବରେ ସଂଜ୍ଞାୟିତ କରିଛନ୍ତି?
options: ସମସ୍ତ ମାନବୀୟ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷୀକରଣର ଜୀବନ୍ତ ଶକ୍ତି ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଧାନ କର୍ତ୍ତା, ଏବଂ ଅନନ୍ତ 'ମୁଁ ଅଛି' (I AM) ର ସୃଷ୍ଟିର ଶାଶ୍ୱତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟର ସୀମିତ ମନରେ ଏକ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତି
ପୂର୍ବର ଏକ ପ୍ରତିଧ୍ୱନି, ଯାହା ସଚେତନ ଇଚ୍ଛାଶକ୍ତି ସହିତ ସହ-ଅବସ୍ଥାନ କରେ, ତଥାପି ଏହାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରିତା ଶୈଳୀରେ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ସହିତ ସମାନ
ସମୟ ଏବଂ ସ୍ଥାନର କ୍ରମରୁ ମୁକ୍ତ ସ୍ମୃତିର ଏକ ରୂପ ବ୍ୟତୀତ ଅନ୍ୟ କିଛି ନୁହେଁ, ଯାହା ଇଚ୍ଛାଶକ୍ତିର ଅନୁଭୂତିକ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ସହିତ ମିଶ୍ରିତ ଏବଂ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତିତ
ସେହି ଅଧ୍ୟାପନ ଯାହା ପୁନଃନିର୍ମାଣ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଦ୍ରବୀଭୂତ, ବିସ୍ତାରିତ ଏବଂ ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ହୁଏ, ଆଦର୍ଶଗତ ଏବଂ ଏକତ୍ରିତ କରିବାକୁ ସଂଘର୍ଷ କରେ
or.explanation: କୋଲରିଜ୍ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ କଳ୍ପନାଶକ୍ତିକୁ ସମସ୍ତ ମାନବୀୟ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷୀକରଣର ଜୀବନ୍ତ ଶକ୍ତି ଏବଂ ମୁଖ୍ୟ କର୍ତ୍ତା ଭାବରେ ସଂଜ୍ଞାୟିତ କରିଛନ୍ତି, ଯାହା ଦୈବୀ ସୃଜନଶୀଳତାର ଏକ ସୀମିତ ପ୍ରତିଫଳନ ଅଟେ। ଅନ୍ୟ ବିକଳ୍ପଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟକ କଳ୍ପନାଶକ୍ତି କିମ୍ବା ଫ୍ୟାନ୍ସି (Fancy) କୁ ସୂଚିତ କରେ।

questions.question: In his influential essay 'The Structural Study of Myth' (1955), the French anthropologist Claude Lévi-Strauss argues that the constituent units of myth, which are organized in bundles to produce meaning, are called:
questions.explanation: Lévi-Strauss adapted linguistic methodology to anthropology, asserting that myth, like language, is made of constituent units. He termed these minimal structural units of myth 'mythemes,' which only acquire meaning when combined into bundles in relations of opposition and correlation.

or.question: ନିଜର ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ 'The Structural Study of Myth' (୧୯୫୫) ରେ, ଫରାସୀ ମାନବବିଜ୍ଞାନୀ କ୍ଲୋଡ୍ ଲେଭି-ଷ୍ଟ୍ରସ୍ ଯୁକ୍ତି କରନ୍ତି ଯେ ପୁରାଣ (myth) ର ଗଠନମୂଳକ ଏକକଗୁଡ଼ିକ, ଯାହା ଅର୍ଥ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀଗତ ଭାବରେ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥିତ ହୋଇଥାଏ, ତାହାକୁ କଣ କୁହାଯାଏ?
or.explanation: ଲେଭି-ଷ୍ଟ୍ରସ୍ ଭାଷାତାତ୍ତ୍ୱିକ ପଦ୍ଧତିକୁ ମାନବବିଜ୍ଞାନରେ ପ୍ରୟୋଗ କରିଥିଲେ। ସେ ଦର୍ଶାଇଥିଲେ ଯେ ପୁରାଣ ଭାଷାର ଫୋନେମ୍ ଏବଂ ମର୍ଫିମ୍ ପରି କେତେକ ଗଠନମୂଳକ ଏକକ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଗଠିତ, ଯାହାକୁ ସେ 'ମାଇଥେମ୍ସ' (mythemes) ବୋଲି କହିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ମାଇଥେମ୍ସଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଏକତ୍ରିତ ହେଲେ ହିଁ ଅର୍ଥ ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଥାଏ।

questions.question: The Personalized System of Instruction (PSI), developed by Fred S. Keller, is a mastery-based teaching method. Which of the following is NOT one of the five core features of the Keller Plan?
options: Use of lectures and demonstrations primarily for motivation rather than information transmission
Unit-perfection requirement for advancement to the next level
Complete exclusion of peer-proctors in the instructional process
questions.explanation: The Keller Plan actively relies on peer-proctors (or undergraduate proctors) to provide immediate feedback, grading, and tutoring to students. Therefore, the complete exclusion of proctors is incorrect as they are a core element of the system.

or.question: ଫ୍ରେଡ୍ ଏସ୍. କେଲର୍‌ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବିକଶିତ ପର୍ସନାଲାଇଜ୍ଡ ସିଷ୍ଟମ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଇନଷ୍ଟ୍ରକସନ୍ (PSI) ହେଉଛି ଏକ ଦକ୍ଷତା-ଭିତ୍ତିକ (mastery-based) ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପଦ୍ଧତି। ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି କେଲର୍ ପ୍ଲାନର ପାଞ୍ଚଟି ମୁଖ୍ୟ ବୈଶିଷ୍ଟ୍ୟ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ନୁହେଁ?
options: ତଥ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଦାନ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ମୁଖ୍ୟତଃ ପ୍ରେରଣାଦାୟୀ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟାନ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନର ବ୍ୟବହାର
ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସ୍ତରକୁ ଯିବା ପାଇଁ ଏକକ-ସିଦ୍ଧି (Unit-perfection) ର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା
ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାରେ ସହପାଠୀ ପ୍ରୋକ୍ଟର (peer-proctors) ମାନଙ୍କୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ବାଦ୍ ଦେବା
or.explanation: କେଲର୍ ପ୍ଲାନରେ ତୁରନ୍ତ ମତାମତ, ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ଏବଂ ଗ୍ରେଡିଂ ସହାୟତା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରୋକ୍ଟର (ସହପାଠୀ ବା ସହାୟକ) ମାନଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ସକ୍ରିୟ ଭାବରେ ନିର୍ଭର କରାଯାଏ। ତେଣୁ, ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ବାଦ୍ ଦେବା କେଲର୍ ପ୍ଲାନର ବୈଶିଷ୍ଟ୍ୟ ନୁହେଁ।

questions.question: In the constructivist '5E' Instructional Model, during which phase do students apply their newly acquired conceptual understanding and skills to new, but related, academic contexts?
questions.explanation: In the 'Elaborate' phase of the 5E model, students extend and solidify their conceptual understanding by applying their learning to new situations, tasks, and real-world contexts.

or.question: ଗଠନମୂଳକ (constructivist) '5E' ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ମଡେଲ୍‌ରେ, କେଉଁ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ନୂତନ ଜ୍ଞାନ ଏବଂ ଦକ୍ଷତାକୁ ନୂତନ ତଥା ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ ଶିକ୍ଷାଗତ ପରିପ୍ରେକ୍ଷୀରେ ପ୍ରୟୋଗ କରନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: 'Elaborate' (ବିସ୍ତୃତୀକରଣ) ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ, ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଶିକ୍ଷାକୁ ନୂତନ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଏବଂ ବାସ୍ତବ ଜଗତ ସହିତ ପ୍ରୟୋଗ କରି ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଧାରଣାକୁ ଆହୁରି ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଓ ଦୃଢ଼ କରନ୍ତି।

questions.question: Who was the first Chief Justice of the Orissa High Court, established in the year 1948?
questions.explanation: The Orissa High Court was formally inaugurated on July 26, 1948. Justice Bira Kishore Ray was appointed as its first Chief Justice.

or.question: ୧୯୪୮ ମସିହାରେ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠିତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଉଚ୍ଚ ନ୍ୟାୟାଳୟ (Orissa High Court) ର ପ୍ରଥମ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ବିଚାରପତି କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ୧୯୪୮ ମସିହା ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୬ ତାରିଖରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଉଚ୍ଚ ନ୍ୟାୟାଳୟ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବେ ଉଦ୍‌ଘାଟିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ବିଚାରପତି ବୀର କିଶୋର ରାୟ ଏହାର ପ୍ରଥମ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ବିଚାରପତି ଭାବେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Who led the historic Salt Satyagraha march from Swaraj Ashram, Cuttack to Inchudi, Balasore after the arrest of Gopabandhu Choudhury in April 1930?
questions.explanation: After the arrest of Gopabandhu Choudhury on April 8, 1930, Acharya Harihar Das led the first batch of satyagrahis from Swaraj Ashram in Cuttack to Inchudi in Balasore to manufacture salt and break the salt law.

or.question: ଏପ୍ରିଲ୍ ୧୯୩୦ ମସିହାରେ ଗୋପବନ୍ଧୁ ଚୌଧୁରୀଙ୍କ ଗିରଫଦାରୀ ପରେ କଟକର ସ୍ୱରାଜ ଆଶ୍ରମରୁ ବାଲେଶ୍ୱରର ଇଞ୍ଚୁଡ଼ି ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଐତିହାସିକ ଲବଣ ସତ୍ୟାଗ୍ରହ ଯାତ୍ରାର ନେତୃତ୍ୱ କିଏ ନେଇଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ୧୯୩୦ ଏପ୍ରିଲ୍ ୮ ତାରିଖରେ ଗୋପବନ୍ଧୁ ଚୌଧୁରୀ ଗିରଫ ହେବା ପରେ, ସ୍ୱରାଜ ଆଶ୍ରମରୁ ବାହାରିଥିବା ସତ୍ୟାଗ୍ରହୀମାନଙ୍କର ପ୍ରଥମ ଦଳର ନେତୃତ୍ୱ ଆଚାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ହରିହର ଦାସ ନେଇଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ଇଞ୍ଚୁଡ଼ିଠାରେ ଲବଣ ଆଇନ ଭଙ୍ଗ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In which year was the 'Utkal Sammilani' founded by Madhusudan Das to spearhead the campaign for a separate Odisha state?
questions.explanation: Utkal Sammilani was founded in December 1903 by Madhusudan Das. It played a pivotal role in the integration of Odia-speaking tracts and the creation of the separate province of Odisha on a linguistic basis in 1936.

or.question: ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶ ଗଠନ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନର ନେତୃତ୍ୱ ନେବା ପାଇଁ ମଧୁସୂଦନ ଦାସଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା କେଉଁ ବର୍ଷ 'ଉତ୍କଳ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀ' ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ୧୯୦୩ ମସିହା ଡିସେମ୍ବରରେ ମଧୁସୂଦନ ଦାସଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଉତ୍କଳ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ୧୯୩୬ ମସିହାରେ ଭାଷା ଭିତ୍ତିରେ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶ ଗଠନ ଏବଂ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଭାଷୀ ଅଞ୍ଚଳଗୁଡ଼ିକର ଏକତ୍ରୀକରଣ ଦିଗରେ ଏହା ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଭୂମିକା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲା।

questions.question: Who was the Chairman of the Orissa Boundary Committee appointed in 1931 by the Government of India to demarcate the boundaries of the proposed separate Odisha province?
questions.explanation: The Orissa Boundary Committee, commonly known as the O'Donnell Committee, was appointed in 1931 under the chairmanship of Sir Samuel O'Donnell to determine the boundaries of the proposed Odisha province.

or.question: ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବିତ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ ପାଇଁ ୧୯୩୧ ମସିହାରେ ଭାରତ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଗଠିତ 'ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ କମିଟି' ର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ କମିଟି, ଯାହା ଓ'ଡୋନେଲ କମିଟି ଭାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଜଣାଶୁଣା, ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବିତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ୧୯୩୧ ମସିହାରେ ସାର୍ ସାମୁଏଲ ଓ'ଡୋନେଲଙ୍କ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷତାରେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: The 'In Memoriam stanza', popularized by Alfred Lord Tennyson in his elegy 'In Memoriam A.H.H.', consists of four lines of iambic tetrameter rhyming in which of the following schemes?
questions.explanation: The In Memoriam stanza is a traditional English poetic form consisting of a quatrain in iambic tetrameter with an envelope rhyme scheme of abba.

or.question: ଆଲଫ୍ରେଡ୍ ଲର୍ଡ୍ ଟେନିସନ୍‌ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ଵାରା ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଶୋକଗୀତି 'In Memoriam A.H.H.' ରେ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ହୋଇ ଲୋକପ୍ରିୟ ହୋଇଥିବା 'In Memoriam stanza', ଆଇଆମ୍ବିକ୍ ଟେଟ୍ରାମିଟରର ଚାରୋଟି ଧାଡ଼ିକୁ ନେଇ ଗଠିତ, ଯାହା ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ପ୍ରାସ (rhyme scheme) କୁ ଅନୁସରଣ କରେ?
or.explanation: In Memoriam stanza ହେଉଛି ଏକ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ଇଂରାଜୀ କାବ୍ୟ ରୂପ ଯାହା ଆଇଆମ୍ବିକ୍ ଟେଟ୍ରାମିଟରରେ ଲିଖିତ ଚାରୋଟି ଧାଡ଼ିର ଏକ ଚତୁଷ୍ପଦୀ (quatrain) ଏବଂ ଏହାର ପ୍ରାସ ଶୈଳୀ 'abba' ଅଟେ।

questions.question: In Edward Said's seminal work 'Orientalism' (1978), his analysis of the discourse of Western power over the Orient heavily draws upon the concepts of power and knowledge formulated by which French philosopher?
questions.explanation: Edward Said utilizes Michel Foucault's concepts of discourse and the complicity of power and knowledge (pouvoir/savoir) to explain how European culture was able to manage, define, and produce the 'Orient' politically and sociologically.

or.question: ଏଡୱାର୍ଡ ସୈଦ୍ (Edward Said) ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ଗ୍ରନ୍ଥ 'Orientalism' (୧୯୭୮) ରେ, ପ୍ରାଚ୍ୟ ଉପରେ ପାଶ୍ଚାତ୍ୟ ଶକ୍ତିର ପ୍ରବଚନ (discourse) ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରିବା ପାଇଁ କେଉଁ ଫରାସୀ ଦାର୍ଶନିକଙ୍କ ଦ୍ଵାରା ପ୍ରଣିତ ଶକ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଜ୍ଞାନ (power and knowledge) ର ଅବଧାରଣା ଉପରେ ବହୁଳ ଭାବରେ ନିର୍ଭର କରିଛନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: ଏଡୱାର୍ଡ ସୈଦ୍ ମିଶେଲ ଫୁକୋଙ୍କ ପ୍ରବଚନ (discourse) ଏବଂ ଶକ୍ତି ଓ ଜ୍ଞାନର ପାରସ୍ପରିକ ସମ୍ପର୍କର ଅବଧାରଣାକୁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି ୟୁରୋପୀୟ ସଂସ୍କୃତି କିପରି ପ୍ରାଚ୍ୟ ଜଗତକୁ ରାଜନୈତିକ ଏବଂ ସାମାଜିକ ସ୍ତରରେ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରିତ ଓ ଉପସ୍ଥାପିତ କରିଥିଲା ତାହା ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କରିଛନ୍ତି।

questions.question: In Flanders' Interaction Analysis Category System (FIACS), which of the following categories represents 'Teacher Talk - Direct Influence'?
questions.explanation: Flanders' Interaction Analysis Category System (FIACS) consists of 10 categories. Categories 1 through 7 represent Teacher Talk. Within Teacher Talk, Categories 1, 2, 3, and 4 are categorized as 'Indirect Influence' (accepting feelings, praising/encouraging, accepting/using ideas, and asking questions). Categories 5, 6, and 7 are categorized as 'Direct Influence' (lecturing, giving directions, and criticizing or justifying authority). Categories 8 and 9 represent Pupil Talk, and Category 10 is Silence or Confusion.

or.question: ଫ୍ଲାଣ୍ଡର୍ସଙ୍କ ଇଣ୍ଟରାକ୍ସନ୍ ଆନାଲିସିସ୍ କ୍ୟାଟେଗୋରୀ ସିଷ୍ଟମ୍ (FIACS) ରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ବର୍ଗଗୁଡିକ 'ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା - ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପ୍ରଭାବ' କୁ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ଵ କରେ?
or.explanation: ଫ୍ଲାଣ୍ଡର୍ସଙ୍କ ଇଣ୍ଟରାକ୍ସନ୍ ଆନାଲିସିସ୍ କ୍ୟାଟେଗୋରୀ ସିଷ୍ଟମ୍ (FIACS) ରେ ୧୦ଟି ବର୍ଗ ରହିଛି। ବର୍ଗ ୧ ରୁ ୭ ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତାକୁ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ଵ କରେ। ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା ମଧ୍ୟରେ, ବର୍ଗ ୧, ୨, ୩ ଏବଂ ୪ କୁ 'ପରୋକ୍ଷ ପ୍ରଭାବ' (Indirect Influence) ଭାବରେ ଶ୍ରେଣୀଭୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ବର୍ଗ ୫, ୬ ଏବଂ ୭ କୁ 'ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପ୍ରଭାବ' (Direct Influence) ଭାବରେ ଶ୍ରେଣୀଭୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି (ଭାଷଣ ଦେବା, ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେବା ଏବଂ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିବା କିମ୍ବା କର୍ତ୍ତୃତ୍ଵ ପ୍ରତିପାଦନ କରିବା)। ବର୍ଗ ୮ ଏବଂ ୯ ହେଉଛି ଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା ଏବଂ ବର୍ଗ ୧୦ ହେଉଛି ନୀରବତା କିମ୍ବା ବିଭ୍ରାନ୍ତି।

questions.question: In the 'Concept Attainment Model' (Reception Model) developed by Jerome Bruner, which of the following activities specifically occurs during Phase 3 (Analysis of Thinking Strategies)?
options: The teacher presents labeled examples (positive and negative) to the students.
Students describe their thoughts and analyze the pattern of hypotheses they used to identify the concept.
Students generate new examples and identify them as positive or negative.
The teacher introduces the name of the concept and defines it.
questions.explanation: In Bruner's Concept Attainment Model (Reception Model), Phase 3 is the 'Analysis of Thinking Strategies'. In this phase, students analyze their cognitive processes by describing their thoughts, discussing how they developed their hypotheses, and evaluating whether they used a focus-gambling or simultaneous scanning strategy to arrive at the concept.

or.question: ଜେରୋମ୍ ବ୍ରୁନର୍‌ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ଵାରା ବିକଶିତ 'କନସେପ୍ଟ ଆଟେନମେଣ୍ଟ ମଡେଲ' (ରିସେପ୍ସନ୍ ମଡେଲ) ରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ଭାବରେ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ୩ (ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା କୌଶଳର ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ) ସମୟରେ ଘଟିଥାଏ?
options: ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଛାତ୍ରମାନଙ୍କୁ ଚିହ୍ନିତ ଉଦାହରଣ (ସକାରାତ୍ମକ ଏବଂ ନକାରାତ୍ମକ) ପ୍ରଦାନ କରନ୍ତି।
ଛାତ୍ରମାନେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଧାରଣା ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିଥିବା ଅନୁମାନର ଶୈଳୀକୁ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରନ୍ତି।
ଛାତ୍ରମାନେ ନୂତନ ଉଦାହରଣ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ସେଗୁଡିକୁ ସକାରାତ୍ମକ କିମ୍ବା ନକାରାତ୍ମକ ଭାବରେ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରନ୍ତି।
ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଧାରଣାର ନାମ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଏହାକୁ ସଂଜ୍ଞାବଦ୍ଧ କରନ୍ତି।
or.explanation: ଜେରୋମ୍ ବ୍ରୁନର୍‌ଙ୍କ କନସେପ୍ଟ ଆଟେନମେଣ୍ଟ ମଡେଲ୍ (ରିସେପ୍ସନ୍ ମଡେଲ୍) ରେ ତିନୋଟି ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ରହିଛି। ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ୧ ରେ ତଥ୍ୟର ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ ଏବଂ ଧାରଣାର ଚିହ୍ନଟୀକରଣ ହୁଏ। ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ୨ ରେ ଧାରଣା ପ୍ରାପ୍ତିର ପରୀକ୍ଷଣ ହୁଏ (ଛାତ୍ରମାନେ ନୂତନ ଉଦାହରଣ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରନ୍ତି)। ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ୩ ରେ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା କୌଶଳର ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ ହୁଏ, ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ଛାତ୍ରମାନେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାକୁ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରନ୍ତି, ସେମାନେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିଥିବା ଅନୁମାନର ଶୈଳୀ ଏବଂ ଗୁଣଗୁଡିକୁ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରନ୍ତି।

questions.question: Who was the Chairman of the Odisha Boundary Committee appointed in 1931 to demarcate the boundary of the proposed new province of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Odisha Boundary Committee (also known as the O'Donnell Committee) was appointed by the Government of India in 1931, with Sir Samuel O'Donnell as its Chairman, to examine and demarcate the boundaries of the proposed separate Odisha province.

or.question: ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବିତ ନୂତନ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ ପାଇଁ ୧୯୩୧ ମସିହାରେ ଗଠିତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ କମିଟି (Odisha Boundary Committee) ର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ୧୯୩୧ ମସିହାରେ ଭାରତ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସୀମା କମିଟି (ଯାହା ଓ'ଡୋନେଲ୍ କମିଟି ଭାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଜଣାଶୁଣା) ଗଠିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା, ଯାହାର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ସାର୍ ସାମୁଏଲ୍ ଓ'ଡୋନେଲ୍ ଥିଲେ। ଏହି କମିଟି ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବିତ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ସୀମା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ ପାଇଁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିଥିଲା।

questions.question: Under the Treaty of Deogaon signed in December 1803, which Maratha ruler ceded the province of Cuttack (including Puri and Balasore) to the British East India Company?
questions.explanation: Following the defeat in the Second Anglo-Maratha War, Raghoji Bhonsle II of Nagpur signed the Treaty of Deogaon on December 17, 1803, ceding the province of Cuttack (which included coastal Odisha districts like Puri and Balasore) to the British East India Company.

or.question: ଡିସେମ୍ବର ୧୮୦୩ ରେ ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷରିତ ଦେଓଗାଁ ଚୁକ୍ତି (Treaty of Deogaon) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, କେଉଁ ମରାଠା ଶାସକ କଟକ ପ୍ରଦେଶ (ପୁରୀ ଏବଂ ବାଲେଶ୍ୱର ସମେତ) କୁ ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ଇଷ୍ଟ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ କମ୍ପାନୀକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ଆଙ୍ଗ୍ଲୋ-ମରାଠା ଯୁଦ୍ଧରେ ପରାଜୟ ପରେ, ନାଗପୁରର ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ରଘୁଜୀ ଭୋଂସଲା ୧୭ ଡିସେମ୍ବର ୧୮୦୩ ରେ ଦେଓଗାଁ ଚୁକ୍ତି ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷର କରିଥିଲେ, ଯାହା ଦ୍ୱାରା ସେ କଟକ ପ୍ରଦେଶକୁ (ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ପୁରୀ ଏବଂ ବାଲେଶ୍ୱର ସମେତ ସମୁଦ୍ର ଉପକୂଳବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ ଥିଲା) ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ଇଷ୍ଟ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ କମ୍ପାନୀକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Under Section 21 of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education (RTE) Act, 2009, which of the following bodies must be constituted in all government schools to monitor school functioning and manage grants?
questions.explanation: Section 21 of the RTE Act, 2009 mandates the formation of a School Management Committee (SMC) in every government-aided school, consisting of elected representatives of the local authority, parents or guardians of children admitted in such schools, and teachers.

questions.question: What is the correct logical sequence of the cyclical phases in a standard cycle of Action Research?
questions.explanation: The standard action research cycle, as conceptualized by Stephen Kemmis and others, follows the sequential order: Planning an action, Acting upon the plan, Observing the process and consequences, and Reflecting on the outcomes to plan further cycles.

questions.question: Which of the following terms describes the phenomenon where newly acquired information disrupts the retrieval of older, previously stored information?
questions.explanation: Retroactive interference occurs when new learning acts backward in time to interfere with the recall of older information. Proactive interference, conversely, is when old information interferes with the retention of new information.

questions.question: Under the new 5+3+3+4 pedagogical structure of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, which age group corresponds specifically to the 'Preparatory Stage'?
questions.explanation: The 'Preparatory Stage' of NEP 2020 covers 3 years of schooling (Grades 3-5) and corresponds to children in the age group of 8 to 11 years. The Foundational stage covers ages 3 to 8.

questions.question: In Jacob Kounin's research on classroom management, what term is used to describe a teacher's ability to demonstrate to students that they are aware of everything that is happening in the classroom at all times?
questions.explanation: Jacob Kounin coined the term 'Withitness' to refer to a teacher's keen awareness of classroom dynamics and their ability to catch and address misbehavior early, effectively communicating to students that nothing escapes their attention.

questions.question: The National Curriculum Framework (NCF) 2005 was primarily guided by the philosophy and recommendations of which historic committee report chaired by Prof. Yash Pal?
options: Towards an Enlightened and Humane Society
questions.explanation: NCF 2005 was highly shaped by the landmark 1993 Yash Pal Committee report titled 'Learning Without Burden', which advocated for reducing cognitive pressure and moving away from rote memorization towards a joyous, child-centered approach.

questions.question: The concept of a Language Acquisition Device (LAD), suggesting humans are biologically pre-programmed with an innate capacity to acquire grammar, is most closely associated with which linguist?
questions.explanation: Noam Chomsky proposed the nativist theory of language acquisition, arguing that children possess an innate biological endowment called the Language Acquisition Device (LAD) that enables them to deduce the rules of their native language.

questions.question: Who is credited with formally introducing the concept and methodology of 'Action Research' into the field of education through the 1953 book 'Action Research to Improve School Practices'?
questions.explanation: While social psychologist Kurt Lewin coined the term 'Action Research' in the 1940s, Stephen M. Corey at Columbia University's Teachers College was the key figure who adapted and popularized it specifically for improving classroom and school practices in 1953.

questions.question: In Stephen Krashen's Monitor Model of Second Language Acquisition, which hypothesis proposes that grammatical structures are internalized in a highly predictable, developmental sequence regardless of the order of formal instruction?
questions.explanation: The Natural Order Hypothesis asserts that the acquisition of grammatical rules follows a predictable progression, meaning certain rules are always acquired early while others are mastered much later, regardless of the learner's age or instruction.

questions.question: When an educational assessment consistently yields identical, stable results under unchanged conditions but fails to measure the actual cognitive domain or learning objective it was designed to evaluate, the test possesses:
questions.explanation: Reliability refers to the consistency/stability of test scores, while validity refers to the accuracy with which a test measures what it claims to measure. Consistent but inaccurate measurements indicate high reliability but low validity.

questions.question: Which specific section of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education (RTE) Act, 2009 strictly prohibits physical punishment and mental harassment of children in schools?
questions.explanation: Section 17 of the RTE Act, 2009 explicitly states that no child shall be subjected to physical punishment or mental harassment, and any violation of this provision shall make the perpetrator liable to disciplinary action under service rules.

questions.question: In a perfectly normal distribution of test scores with a mean of 50 and a standard deviation of 10, a student who achieves a raw score of 60 would fall closest to which percentile rank?
questions.explanation: A raw score of 60 is exactly one standard deviation (+1 SD) above the mean of 50. In a normal distribution, approximately 34.13% of scores fall between the mean and +1 SD. Adding this to the 50% of scores below the mean yields roughly the 84th percentile (84.13%).

questions.question: The National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 proposes the establishment of the Higher Education Commission of India (HECI) as an umbrella body. Which of its four independent verticals is tasked with the function of funding higher education?
questions.explanation: NEP 2020 outlines four distinct verticals for HECI: NHERC (regulation), NAC (accreditation), HEGC (funding/grants), and GEC (academic standard-setting). Thus, HEGC is responsible for funding and grants.

questions.question: Which classroom management model, developed by Richard Curwin and Allen Mendler, emphasizes turning discipline issues into life lessons by teaching students responsibility, establishing clear consequences instead of punishments, and maintaining mutual respect?
questions.explanation: Richard Curwin and Allen Mendler developed the 'Discipline with Dignity' framework, which advocates for treating students with respect while setting firm, clear boundaries, focusing on teaching students self-control rather than enforcing external compliance.

questions.question: In cognitive psychology, what is the term coined by Elizabeth Loftus to describe the phenomenon where a person's recollection of an observed event becomes distorted or inaccurate after being exposed to post-event misleading details?
questions.explanation: The 'Misinformation Effect' is a classic cognitive phenomenon researched extensively by Elizabeth Loftus, demonstrating that eyewitness testimony can be easily manipulated by planting subtle, misleading information during post-event questioning.

questions.question: In his landmark essay "Art as Device" (1917), Viktor Shklovsky introduces the concept of defamiliarization (ostranenie). Which of the following literary works by Leo Tolstoy does he primarily use as an example to show how Tolstoy defamiliarizes the institution of private property by narrating from the perspective of a horse?
questions.explanation: In "Art as Device", Viktor Shklovsky extensively cites Leo Tolstoy's short story "Kholstomer" (also known as "Strider"), which is narrated by a piebald horse. Through this equine narrator, Tolstoy defamiliarizes human conventions such as private property, making them seem strange and unnatural.

or.question: ବିକ୍ଟର ଶ୍କଲୋଭସ୍କି (Viktor Shklovsky) ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ "Art as Device" (୧୯୧୭) ରେ ବିମୁଗ୍ଧତା ବା ଅପରିଚିତକରଣ (defamiliarization/ostranenie) ର ଅବଧାରଣା ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଟଲଷ୍ଟୟ ଏକ ଘୋଡ଼ାର ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣରୁ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରି ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସମ୍ପତ୍ତିର ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନକୁ କିପରି ଅପରିଚିତ କରାଉଛନ୍ତି, ତାହା ଦେଖାଇବା ପାଇଁ ସେ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଲିଓ ଟଲଷ୍ଟୟଙ୍କ କେଉଁ ସାହିତ୍ୟିକ କୃତିକୁ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଉଦାହରଣ ଭାବରେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିଛନ୍ତି?
options: "ଦି ଡେଥ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଇଭାନ୍ ଇଲିଚ୍" (The Death of Ivan Ilyich)
or.explanation: ଶ୍କଲୋଭସ୍କି ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ "Art as Device" ରେ ଲିଓ ଟଲଷ୍ଟୟଙ୍କ କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ରଗଳ୍ପ "ଖୋଲଷ୍ଟୋମର୍" (Kholstomer / Strider) ର ବହୁଳ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିଛନ୍ତି, ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନାକାରୀ ହେଉଛି ଏକ ଘୋଡ଼ା। ଏହା ଦ୍ୱାରା ମାନବୀୟ ପ୍ରଥା ଯେପରିକି ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସମ୍ପତ୍ତିକୁ ଏକ ଅପରିଚିତ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣରୁ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରାଯାଇଛି।

questions.question: Matthew Arnold's famous poem "The Scholar-Gipsy" (1853) is based on an account found in which 17th-century prose work by Joseph Glanvill?
questions.explanation: Matthew Arnold's "The Scholar-Gipsy" is based on a story from Joseph Glanvill's book 'The Vanity of Dogmatizing' (1661), which tells the tale of an impoverished Oxford student who left his studies to join a band of gypsies and learn their traditional lore.

or.question: ମାଥ୍ୟୁ ଆର୍ନୋଲ୍ଡଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ କବିତା "The Scholar-Gipsy" (୧୮୫୩) ଜୋସେଫ୍ ଗ୍ଲାନଭିଲ୍‌ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଲିଖିତ କେଉଁ ୧୭ଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ଗଦ୍ୟ ରଚନା ଉପରେ ଆଧାରିତ?
options: ଦି ଭ୍ୟାନିଟି ଅଫ୍ ଡଗ୍ମାଟାଇଜିଙ୍ଗ୍ (The Vanity of Dogmatizing)
or.explanation: ମାଥ୍ୟୁ ଆର୍ନୋଲ୍ଡଙ୍କ "The Scholar-Gipsy" କବିତାର କାହାଣୀ ଜୋସେଫ୍ ଗ୍ଲାନଭିଲ୍‌ଙ୍କ 'ଦି ଭ୍ୟାନିଟି ଅଫ୍ ଡଗ୍ମାଟାଇଜିଙ୍ଗ୍' (୧୬୬୧) ପୁସ୍ତକରୁ ନିଆଯାଇଛି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ଜଣେ ଦରିଦ୍ର ଅକ୍ସଫୋର୍ଡ ଛାତ୍ର ପାଠପଢା ଛାଡି ଜିପ୍ସୀମାନଙ୍କ ଦଳରେ ସାମିଲ ହେବା ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ଜ୍ଞାନ ଶିଖିବା କଥା ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରାଯାଇଛି।

questions.question: In William J.J. Gordon's Synectics Model of teaching, which type of analogy involves comparing a scientific or technical concept to a personal feeling or human experience, often asking the student to 'become' the physical object or element?
questions.explanation: In William Gordon's Synectics Model, 'Personal Analogy' requires students to empathize and identify with the ideas, physical objects, or non-human elements under study (e.g., asking a student to imagine being a water molecule undergoing evaporation). This helps in making the strange familiar and generating creative insights.

or.question: ୱିଲିୟମ୍ ଜେ.ଜେ. ଗର୍ଡନ୍‌ଙ୍କ ସିନେକ୍ଟିକ୍ସ ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ମଡେଲ୍‌ରେ (Synectics Model of teaching), କେଉଁ ପ୍ରକାରର ସାଦୃଶ୍ୟ (analogy) ଏକ ବୈଜ୍ଞାନିକ କିମ୍ବା ବୈଷୟିକ ଧାରଣାକୁ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଅନୁଭୂତି କିମ୍ବା ମାନବୀୟ ଅନୁଭବ ସହିତ ତୁଳନା କରେ, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ପ୍ରାୟତଃ ଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ସେହି ଭୌତିକ ବସ୍ତୁ କିମ୍ବା ଉପାଦାନରେ 'ପରିଣତ ହେବାକୁ' କୁହାଯାଇଥାଏ?
or.explanation: ୱିଲିୟମ୍ ଗର୍ଡନ୍‌ଙ୍କ ସିନେକ୍ଟିକ୍ସ ମଡେଲ୍‌ରେ, 'ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସାଦୃଶ୍ୟ' (Personal Analogy) ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ କିମ୍ବା ଅଜୀବ ବସ୍ତୁ ସହିତ ନିଜକୁ ଯୋଡ଼ିବାକୁ ଏବଂ ସେହି ସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଅନୁଭବ କରିବାକୁ (ଯେପରିକି ବାଷ୍ପୀଭୂତ ହେଉଥିବା ଜଳ ଅଣୁ ହେବା) ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହିତ କରିଥାଏ, ଯାହା ସୃଜନଶୀଳ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାର ବିକାଶ କରେ।

questions.question: According to Robert Gagné's Nine Events of Instruction, which of the following events immediately follows the presentation of the stimulus material (Presenting the content)?
questions.explanation: In Robert Gagné's 9-step instructional model, the fifth event is 'Providing learning guidance' (which involves semantic encoding, hints, or scaffolds), and it immediately follows the fourth event, which is 'Presenting the stimulus/content'.

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ଗ୍ୟାଗ୍ନେଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନର ନଅଟି ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ (Nine Events of Instruction) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, 'ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରିବା' (Presenting the content) ପରେ ତୁରନ୍ତ କେଉଁ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟଟି ଆସିଥାଏ?
options: ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ମାର୍ଗଦର୍ଶନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା (Providing learning guidance)
ପୂର୍ବ ଶିକ୍ଷଣର ସ୍ମରଣକୁ ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବା (Stimulating recall of prior learning)
or.explanation: ରବର୍ଟ ଗ୍ୟାଗ୍ନେଙ୍କ ନଅଟି ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ମଡେଲ୍‌ରେ, ପଞ୍ଚମ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟଟି ହେଉଛି 'ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ମାର୍ଗଦର୍ଶନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା' (ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ସୂଚନାଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ସହଜରେ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସହାୟତା ଦିଆଯାଏ), ଏବଂ ଏହା ଚତୁର୍ଥ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ 'ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରିବା' ପରେ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଆସିଥାଏ।

questions.question: Who presided over the first session of the Orissa States People's Conference (All Orissa Garhjat Praja Sammilani) held at Cuttack in 1931?
questions.explanation: The first session of the Orissa States People's Conference (Garhjat Praja Sammilani) was held at Cuttack in June 1931 under the presidency of Bhubananda Das, with Radhanath Rath serving as its secretary. It aimed to address the socio-political grievances of the people living under the autocratic rule of the princely states.

or.question: ୧୯୩୧ ମସିହାରେ କଟକଠାରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଥିବା 'ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ପ୍ରଜା ସମ୍ମିଳନୀ' (Orissa States People's Conference) ର ପ୍ରଥମ ଅଧିବେଶନରେ କିଏ ସଭାପତିତ୍ୱ କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ୧୯୩୧ ଜୁନ୍ ମସିହାରେ କଟକଠାରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ପ୍ରଜା ସମ୍ମିଳନୀର ପ୍ରଥମ ଅଧିବେଶନ ଭୁବନାନନ୍ଦ ଦାସଙ୍କ ସଭାପତିତ୍ୱରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ରାଧାନାଥ ରଥ ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଭାବରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହାର ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ଥିଲା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ରାଜ୍ୟଗୁଡ଼ିକର ପ୍ରଜାମାନଙ୍କର ସାମାଜିକ-ରାଜନୈତିକ ସମସ୍ୟାଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସମାଧାନ କରିବା।

questions.question: In which year was the Similipal Biosphere Reserve of Odisha included in the UNESCO World Network of Biosphere Reserves?
questions.explanation: Similipal Biosphere Reserve, located in the Mayurbhanj district of Odisha, was officially included in the UNESCO World Network of Biosphere Reserves in May 2009.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଶିମିଳିପାଳ ଜୈବମଣ୍ଡଳ ସଂରକ୍ଷିତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ (Similipal Biosphere Reserve) କେଉଁ ବର୍ଷ ୟୁନେସ୍କୋ (UNESCO) ର ବିଶ୍ୱ ଜୈବମଣ୍ଡଳ ସଂରକ୍ଷିତ ନେଟୱାର୍କରେ ସାମିଲ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ମୟୂରଭଞ୍ଜ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ଶିମିଳିପାଳ ଜୈବମଣ୍ଡଳ ସଂରକ୍ଷିତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳକୁ ୨୦୦୯ ମସିହାରେ ୟୁନେସ୍କୋର ବିଶ୍ୱ ଜୈବମଣ୍ଡଳ ସଂରକ୍ଷିତ ନେଟୱାର୍କରେ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: The famous Brahmeswara Temple in Bhubaneswar, which marks a significant transition in Kalinga architecture, was built by Kolavati Devi. What was her relationship to the ruling Somavamshi king Udyotakesari?
questions.explanation: The Brahmeswara Temple in Bhubaneswar was built by Kolavati Devi, the mother of the Somavamshi king Udyotakesari, in the mid-11th century CE (around 1058 CE, during his 18th regnal year).

or.question: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ବ୍ରହ୍ମେଶ୍ୱର ମନ୍ଦିର, ଯାହା କଳିଙ୍ଗ ସ୍ଥାପତ୍ୟ କଳାରେ ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ, ତାହା କୋଳାବତୀ ଦେବୀଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଶାସକ ସୋମବଂଶୀ ରାଜା ଉଦ୍ୟୋତକେଶରୀଙ୍କ ସହ ତାଙ୍କର ସମ୍ପର୍କ କଣ ଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର ବ୍ରହ୍ମେଶ୍ୱର ମନ୍ଦିର ଏକାଦଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ମଧ୍ୟଭାଗରେ (ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୦୫୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦରେ, ଉଦ୍ୟୋତକେଶରୀଙ୍କ ୧୮ତମ ରାଜତ୍ୱ ବର୍ଷରେ) ସୋମବଂଶୀ ରାଜା ଉଦ୍ୟୋତକେଶରୀଙ୍କ ମାତା କୋଳାବତୀ ଦେବୀଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: Which of the following princely states (Garhjat) was the first to sign the merger agreement with the province of Orissa in November 1947, leading the way for the integration of other princely states?
questions.explanation: Nilgiri was the first princely state in Odisha to merge with the province of Orissa. Due to severe law and order issues arising from the Prajamandal movement, the Government of India intervened, and its administration was taken over on 14th November 1947.

or.question: ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ରାଜ୍ୟଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ନଭେମ୍ବର ୧୯୪୭ ରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶ ସହିତ ମିଶ୍ରଣ ଚୁକ୍ତି ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷର କରିବାରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ଥିଲା, ଯାହା ଅନ୍ୟ ଗଡ଼ଜାତଗୁଡ଼ିକର ମିଶ୍ରଣ ପାଇଁ ପଥ ପ୍ରଶସ୍ତ କରିଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ନୀଳଗିରି ହେଉଛି ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ପ୍ରଥମ ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ରାଜ୍ୟ ଯାହା ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶ ସହିତ ମିଶିଥିଲା। ପ୍ରଜାମଣ୍ଡଳ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ଯୋଗୁଁ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥିବା ଗୁରୁତର ଆଇନ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳା ପରିସ୍ଥିତି କାରଣରୁ ଭାରତ ସରକାର ହସ୍ତକ୍ଷେପ କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ୧୪ ନଭେମ୍ବର ୧୯୪୭ ରେ ଏହାର ପ୍ରଶାସନ ହାତକୁ ନେଇଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Gerard Manley Hopkins's poetic theory, which term refers to the unique, dynamic, and essential inner pattern or identity of a thing, which makes it distinctively itself?
questions.explanation: Inscape is the term coined by Gerard Manley Hopkins to denote the unique, essential, and unifying design or identity of a natural object or person, a concept influenced by the philosophy of Duns Scotus.

or.question: ଜେରାର୍ଡ ମ୍ୟାନଲି ହପକିନ୍ସଙ୍କ କାବ୍ୟିକ ତତ୍ତ୍ୱରେ, କେଉଁ ଶବ୍ଦଟି ଏକ ବସ୍ତୁର ଅନନ୍ୟ, ଗତିଶୀଳ ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ତର୍ନିହିତ ଆଭ୍ୟନ୍ତରୀଣ ଢାଞ୍ଚା ବା ପରିଚୟକୁ ସୂଚିତ କରେ, ଯାହା ଏହାକୁ ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର କରିଥାଏ?
or.explanation: ଇନସ୍କେପ୍ (Inscape) ହେଉଛି କୌଣସି ବସ୍ତୁର ଅନନ୍ୟ ଆଭ୍ୟନ୍ତରୀଣ ସ୍ୱରୂପ ବା ଅନ୍ତର୍ନିହିତ ପରିଚୟ, ଯାହାକୁ ହପକିନ୍ସ ଡନ୍ସ ସ୍କୋଟସଙ୍କ ଦର୍ଶନରୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Alexander Pope's satirical mock-epic *The Rape of the Lock*, who is the chief of the Sylphs who attempts to protect Belinda and her hair from the impending danger?
questions.explanation: In Pope's *The Rape of the Lock*, Ariel is the chief sylph (spirit of the air) who acts as Belinda's guardian. Umbriel is a gnome, while Crispissa and Brillante are other sylphs assigned to guard her lock and earrings respectively.

or.question: ଆଲେକଜାଣ୍ଡାର ପୋପଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟଙ୍ଗାତ୍ମକ ମହାକାବ୍ୟ *ଦି ରେପ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଦି ଲକ୍* (The Rape of the Lock) ରେ, ସିଲ୍ଫ (Sylphs) ମାନଙ୍କର ପ୍ରମୁଖ କିଏ, ଯିଏ ବେଲିଣ୍ଡା ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ କେଶକୁ ଆସନ୍ନ ବିପଦରୁ ରକ୍ଷା କରିବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: ପୋପଙ୍କ *ଦି ରେପ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଦି ଲକ୍* ରେ, ଏରିଏଲ୍ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ସିଲ୍ଫମାନଙ୍କର ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଯିଏ ବେଲିଣ୍ଡାଙ୍କ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଦାୟିତ୍ୱରେ ଥାଆନ୍ତି। ଅମ୍ବ୍ରିଏଲ୍ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ଏକ ଗ୍ନୋମ (gnome), ଏବଂ କ୍ରିସପିସା ଓ ବ୍ରିଲାଣ୍ଟେ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ଅନ୍ୟତମ ସିଲ୍ଫ।

questions.question: In Henry Morrison's Unit Method of teaching, which of the following is the correct sequential order of the steps involved in the mastery of a unit?
questions.explanation: Henry Morrison proposed five sequential steps for his unit teaching model to ensure mastery: 1. Exploration (testing previous knowledge), 2. Presentation (introducing new content), 3. Assimilation (individual study and internalization), 4. Organization (systematic arrangement of learned material), and 5. Recitation (oral presentation or revision).

or.question: ହେନେରୀ ମରିସନଙ୍କ (Henry Morrison) ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନର ୟୁନିଟ୍ ପଦ୍ଧତି (Unit Method) ରେ, ଏକ ୟୁନିଟ୍‌ର ଦକ୍ଷତା ହାସଲ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ଅଟେ?
or.explanation: ହେନେରୀ ମରିସନ ଦକ୍ଷତା ହାସଲ ପାଇଁ ପାଞ୍ଚଟି କ୍ରମିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ଦେଇଥିଲେ: ୧. ଅନୁସନ୍ଧାନ (ପୂର୍ବ ଜ୍ଞାନର ପରୀକ୍ଷା), ୨. ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ (ନୂତନ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁର ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ), ୩. ଆତ୍ମୀକରଣ (ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଓ ଆତ୍ମୀକରଣ), ୪. ସଂଗଠନ (ଶିକ୍ଷା କରିଥିବା ବିଷୟର ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥିତ ସଂଗଠନ) ଏବଂ ୫. ଆବୃତ୍ତି (ମୌଖିକ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ ବା ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତି)।

questions.question: In Edgar Dale's 'Cone of Experience', which of the following instructional activities represents the most concrete level of learning experience?
options: Designing or performing in a dramatic participation
Viewing a motion picture or educational television
Analyzing a diagram or visual symbol
Engaging in a direct, purposeful experience
questions.explanation: At the base of Edgar Dale's Cone of Experience lies 'Direct, Purposeful Experiences', which involve firsthand sensory experiences and are considered the most concrete level of learning, while verbal and visual symbols are at the pinnacle (most abstract).

or.question: ଏଡଗାର୍ ଡେଲ୍‌ଙ୍କ 'ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ଶଙ୍କୁ' (Cone of Experience) ରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ସବୁଠାରୁ ବାସ୍ତବ ବା ମୂର୍ତ୍ତ (concrete) ସ୍ତରର ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତାକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ?
options: ନାଟକୀୟ ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣରେ ଡିଜାଇନ୍ କରିବା ବା ଅଭିନୟ କରିବା
ଏକ ଚିତ୍ର ବା ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ସଙ୍କେତର ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରିବା
or.explanation: ଏଡଗାର୍ ଡେଲ୍‌ଙ୍କ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ଶଙ୍କୁର ଆଧାର ବା ନିମ୍ନଭାଗରେ 'ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ, ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟମୂଳକ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା' ରହିଛି, ଯାହା ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଜ୍ଞାନେନ୍ଦ୍ରିୟ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ସହିତ ଜଡ଼ିତ ଏବଂ ଏହାକୁ ସବୁଠାରୁ ବାସ୍ତବ ବା ମୂର୍ତ୍ତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ସ୍ତର ବୋଲି ବିବେଚନା କରାଯାଏ, ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ମୌଖିକ ଏବଂ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ସଙ୍କେତଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଶୀର୍ଷରେ (ସବୁଠାରୁ ବିମୂର୍ତ୍ତ) ଥାଏ।

questions.question: Who was the first female ruler of the Bhauma-Kara dynasty of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Tribhuvana Mahadevi I was the first female ruler of the Bhauma-Kara dynasty. She ascended the throne in the 9th century AD after the death of her husband's nephew, Subhakara III. She was a devout follower of Vaishnavism and is known for her administrative skills.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଭୌମକର ବଂଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ମହିଳା ଶାସକ କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ତ୍ରିଭୁବନ ମହାଦେବୀ ପ୍ରଥମ ଭୌମକର ବଂଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ମହିଳା ଶାସକ ଥିଲେ। ନବମ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀରେ ନିଜ ସ୍ୱାମୀଙ୍କ ଭ୍ରାତୃଷ୍ପୁତ୍ର ଶୁଭାକର ତୃତୀୟଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପରେ ସେ ସିଂହାସନ ଆରୋହଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ସେ ଜଣେ ପରମ ବୈଷ୍ଣବୀ ଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ନିଜର ଦକ୍ଷ ଶାସନ ପାଇଁ ପରିଚିତ ଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Which of the following wildlife sanctuaries in Odisha is also popularly known as 'Ushakothi Wildlife Sanctuary'?
questions.explanation: Badrama Wildlife Sanctuary, located in the Sambalpur district of Odisha, is popularly known as Ushakothi Wildlife Sanctuary. Established in 1962, it is famous for its rich biodiversity including elephants, tigers, leopards, and gaur.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ବନ୍ୟପ୍ରାଣୀ ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ 'ଉଷାକୋଠୀ ବନ୍ୟପ୍ରାଣୀ ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ' ଭାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଜଣାଶୁଣା?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ସମ୍ବଲପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ବଦ୍ରାମା ବନ୍ୟପ୍ରାଣୀ ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ଉଷାକୋଠୀ ବନ୍ୟପ୍ରାଣୀ ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ ଭାବରେ ଜଣାଶୁଣା। ୧୯୬୨ ମସିହାରେ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠିତ ଏହି ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ ହାତୀ, ବାଘ, ଚିତାବାଘ ଏବଂ ଗୟଳ ଆଦି ଜୀବଜନ୍ତୁଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ।

questions.question: Who among the following was the court poet of Gajapati Prataparudra Deva and composed the famous Sanskrit work 'Bhakti Bhagavata Mahakavyam'?
questions.explanation: Kavi Dindima Jivadevacharya was the court poet and preceptor of Gajapati Prataparudra Deva. He composed 'Bhakti Bhagavata Mahakavyam' in 1510 AD, which provides invaluable historical information about the Gajapati dynasty.

or.question: ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କିଏ ଗଜପତି ପ୍ରତାପରୁଦ୍ର ଦେବଙ୍କ ସଭାକବି ଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ସଂସ୍କୃତ ଗ୍ରନ୍ଥ 'ଭକ୍ତି ଭାଗବତ ମହାକାବ୍ୟମ୍' ରଚନା କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: କବି ଡିଣ୍ଡିମ ଜୀବଦେବାଚାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଗଜପତି ପ୍ରତାପରୁଦ୍ର ଦେବଙ୍କ ସଭାକବି ଏବଂ ଗୁରୁ ଥିଲେ। ସେ ୧୫୧୦ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦରେ 'ଭକ୍ତି ଭାଗବତ ମହାକାବ୍ୟମ୍' ରଚନା କରିଥିଲେ, ଯାହା ଗଜପତି ଶାସକମାନଙ୍କର ଇତିହାସ ବିଷୟରେ ବହୁମୂଲ୍ୟ ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଥାଏ।

questions.question: Who was the British Political Agent of the Orissa States Agency who was assassinated during the Prajamandal Movement in Ranpur State in January 1939?
questions.explanation: Major R. L. Bazalgette, the Political Agent of the Orissa States, was killed by an agitated mob at Ranpur on 5th January 1939 during the Prajamandal Movement against the tyrannical ruler of Ranpur.

or.question: ୧୯୩୯ ଜାନୁଆରୀରେ ରଣପୁର ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ପ୍ରଜାମଣ୍ଡଳ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସମୟରେ ହତ୍ୟା କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ଏଜେନ୍ସିର ବ୍ରିଟିଶ୍ ପଲିଟିକାଲ୍ ଏଜେଣ୍ଟ କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗଡ଼ଜାତର ପଲିଟିକାଲ୍ ଏଜେଣ୍ଟ ମେଜର ଆର. ଏଲ. ବାଜେଲଗେଟ୍‌ଙ୍କୁ ୫ ଜାନୁଆରୀ ୧୯୩୯ରେ ରଣପୁରର ଅତ୍ୟାଚାରୀ ଶାସକଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ପ୍ରଜାମଣ୍ଡଳ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସମୟରେ ଏକ ଉତ୍ତ୍ୟକ୍ତ ଜନତା ହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Gérard Genette’s 'Narrative Discourse' (1980), which term refers to the temporal relationship of speed or tempo between the story (histoire) and the narrative (récit), encompassing ellipses, pauses, scenes, and summaries?
questions.explanation: According to Gérard Genette's structuralist narratology, 'Duration' (durée) refers to the speed or pace of the narrative, which is determined by the relationship between the duration of the story events (in minutes, hours, days, or years) and the length of the text dedicated to them (in lines or pages). This is categorized into four main movements: ellipsis, pause, scene, and summary.

or.question: ଜେରାର୍ଡ ଜେନେଟ୍‌ଙ୍କ ‘ନାରେଟିଭ୍ ଡିସ୍କୋର୍ସ’ (୧୯୮୦) ରେ, କାହାଣୀର ପ୍ରକୃତ ସମୟ (histoire) ଏବଂ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନାତ୍ମକ ସମୟ (récit) ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଥିବା ଗତି ବା ବେଗର ସମ୍ପର୍କକୁ କେଉଁ ଶବ୍ଦ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୂଚିତ କରାଯାଏ, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ଏଲିପସିସ୍, ବିରତି, ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ସାରାଂଶ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ?
or.explanation: ଜେରାର୍ଡ ଜେନେଟ୍‌ଙ୍କ ସଂରଚନାବାଦୀ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା ସିଦ୍ଧାନ୍ତ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, 'Duration' (ଅବଧି) ହେଉଛି କାହାଣୀର ଘଟଣାବଳୀର ସମୟ ଏବଂ ପାଠ୍ୟରେ ସେଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ନିଆଯାଇଥିବା ସମୟ ବା ଦୈର୍ଘ୍ୟ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଥିବା ସମ୍ପର୍କ । ଏହାକୁ ଚାରୋଟି ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଭାଗରେ ବିଭକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି: ଏଲିପସିସ୍ (ellipsis), ବିରତି (pause), ଦୃଶ୍ୟ (scene) ଏବଂ ସାରାଂଶ (summary) ।

questions.question: In Nissim Ezekiel's famous autobiographical poem 'Background, Casually', the poet reflects on his identity as a member of which specific community in India?
questions.explanation: Nissim Ezekiel was born into the Bene Israel Jewish community, a historic Jewish community in Maharashtra, India. His poem 'Background, Casually' poignantly explores his experiences of alienation, marginalization, and ultimate belonging in India through this specific cultural lens.

or.question: ନିସିମ୍ ଏଜିକିଏଲ୍‌ଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଆତ୍ମଜୀବନୀମୂଳକ କବିତା 'ବ୍ୟାକଗ୍ରାଉଣ୍ଡ, କାଜୁଆଲି' (Background, Casually) ରେ, କବି ଭାରତର କେଉଁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟର ସଦସ୍ୟ ଭାବରେ ନିଜର ପରିଚୟ ପ୍ରତିଫଳିତ କରିଛନ୍ତି?
options: ବେନେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ୍ ଯିହୁଦୀ ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟ (Bene Israel Jewish community)
or.explanation: ନିସିମ୍ ଏଜିକିଏଲ୍ ଭାରତର ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରରେ ଥିବା ଏକ ପ୍ରାଚୀନ ଯିହୁଦୀ ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟ 'ବେନେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ୍' ରେ ଜନ୍ମଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ । ତାଙ୍କର କବିତା 'Background, Casually' ରେ ସେ ଏହି ସାଂସ୍କୃତିକ ପୃଷ୍ଠଭୂମିକୁ ନେଇ ଭାରତୀୟ ସମାଜରେ ନିଜର ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନତା ଏବଂ ପରିଚୟର ଅନୁଭୂତିକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଇଛନ୍ତି ।

questions.question: The famous Asanpat stone inscription, which depicts the Tandava dance of Lord Shiva and provides valuable historical information about the king Satrubhanja, is preserved in which museum?
questions.explanation: The Asanpat stone inscription of the 3rd-4th century AD was found in Keonjhar district. It depicts an eight-armed Lord Shiva performing the Tandava dance and records the achievements of the Bhanja ruler Satrubhanja. It is preserved in the Odisha State Museum, Bhubaneswar.

or.question: ଭଗବାନ ଶିବଙ୍କ ତାଣ୍ଡବ ନୃତ୍ୟ ଚିତ୍ରଣ କରୁଥିବା ଏବଂ ରାଜା ଶତ୍ରୁଭଞ୍ଜଙ୍କ ବିଷୟରେ ମୂଲ୍ୟବାନ ଐତିହାସିକ ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରୁଥିବା ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ 'ଆସନପାଟ' ଶିଳାଲେଖ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ କେଉଁ ସଂଗ୍ରହାଳୟରେ ସଂରକ୍ଷିତ ଅଛି?
or.explanation: ତୃତୀୟ-ଚତୁର୍ଥ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲ୍ଲାରୁ ମିଳିଥିବା ଆସନପାଟ ଶିଳାଲେଖରେ ଆଠ ହାତ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଭଗବାନ ଶିବଙ୍କ ତାଣ୍ଡବ ନୃତ୍ୟ ଚିତ୍ରିତ ହୋଇଛି ଏବଂ ଭଞ୍ଜ ଶାସକ ଶତ୍ରୁଭଞ୍ଜଙ୍କ କୀର୍ତ୍ତି ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହା ଓଡ଼ିଶା ରାଜ୍ୟ ସଂଗ୍ରହାଳୟ, ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରେ ସଂରକ୍ଷିତ ଅଛି।

questions.question: Who was the first woman to be elected to the Odisha Legislative Assembly in the year 1937?
questions.explanation: Sarala Devi was a prominent freedom fighter, feminist, and social reformer who became the first woman elected to the Odisha Legislative Assembly in 1937 from the Cuttack town constituency.

or.question: ୧୯୩୭ ମସିହାରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ବିଧାନସଭାକୁ ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରଥମ ମହିଳା କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ସରଳା ଦେବୀ ଜଣେ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନତା ସଂଗ୍ରାମୀ, ନାରୀବାଦୀ ଏବଂ ସମାଜ ସଂସ୍କାରକ ଥିଲେ ଯିଏ ୧୯୩୭ ମସିହାରେ କଟକ ସହର ନିର୍ବାଚନ ମଣ୍ଡଳୀରୁ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ବିଧାନସଭାକୁ ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରଥମ ମହିଳା ହୋଇଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Raja Rao's novel 'Kanthapura' (1938), which character acts as the narrator, recounting the nationalist struggle of the village through the style of a traditional 'Sthala-Purana'?
questions.explanation: Achakka is the narrator of the novel. She is an elderly Brahmin widow who tells the story of how the remote village of Kanthapura got caught up in the whirlwind of the Gandhian nationalist movement.

or.question: ରାଜା ରାଓଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଉପନ୍ୟାସ 'କାନ୍ଥପୁରା' (୧୯୩୮) ରେ, କେଉଁ ଚରିତ୍ରଟି କଥକ (narrator) ଭାବରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରେ, ଯିଏ ଏକ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ 'ସ୍ଥଳ-ପୁରାଣ' ଶୈଳୀରେ ଗ୍ରାମର ଜାତୀୟତାବାଦୀ ସଂଗ୍ରାମର ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଥାଏ?
or.explanation: ଅଚକ୍କା ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ଏହି ଉପନ୍ୟାସର କଥକ। ସେ ଜଣେ ବୃଦ୍ଧା ବ୍ରାହ୍ମଣ ବିଧବା ଯିଏ କାନ୍ଥପୁରା ଗ୍ରାମଟି କିପରି ଗାନ୍ଧୀବାଦୀ ଜାତୀୟତାବାଦୀ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସହିତ ଜଡ଼ିତ ହେଲା ସେହି ବିଷୟରେ କାହାଣୀ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଛନ୍ତି।

questions.question: Jacques Derrida's seminal paper 'Structure, Sign, and Play in the Discourse of the Human Sciences', which heralded the advent of post-structuralism, was first presented in 1966 at an international colloquium hosted by which university?
questions.explanation: Jacques Derrida first delivered his landmark paper at an international symposium titled 'The Languages of Criticism and the Sciences of Man', held at Johns Hopkins University in October 1966.

or.question: ଜାକ୍ ଡେରିଡାଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ 'Structure, Sign, and Play in the Discourse of the Human Sciences', ଯାହା ଉତ୍ତର-ସଂରଚନାବାଦ (post-structuralism) ର ଆଗମନକୁ ସୂଚିତ କରିଥିଲା, ତାହା ୧୯୬୬ ମସିହାରେ କେଉଁ ବିଶ୍ୱବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଆଲୋଚନାଚକ୍ରରେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଉପସ୍ଥାପିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଜାକ୍ ଡେରିଡା ଅକ୍ଟୋବର ୧୯୬୬ ରେ ଜନ୍ସ ହପକିନ୍ସ ବିଶ୍ୱବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ 'The Languages of Criticism and the Sciences of Man' ଶୀର୍ଷକ ଏକ ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଏହି ଐତିହାସିକ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ ପାଠ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Flanders' Interaction Analysis Category System (FIACS), which category corresponds specifically to 'Accepting or using ideas of pupils'?
questions.explanation: In Flanders' 10-category system, Category 3 represents 'Accepting or using ideas of pupils', which falls under the Teacher Talk (Indirect Influence) dimension.

or.question: ଫ୍ଲାଣ୍ଡର୍ସଙ୍କ ଇଣ୍ଟରାକ୍ସନ ଆନାଲିସିସ୍ କ୍ୟାଟେଗୋରୀ ସିଷ୍ଟମ୍ (FIACS) ରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ବିଭାଗଟି 'ଛାତ୍ରମାନଙ୍କର ବିଚାର ବା ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା କିମ୍ବା ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବା' (Accepting or using ideas of pupils) କୁ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ୱ କରେ?
or.explanation: ଫ୍ଲାଣ୍ଡର୍ସଙ୍କ FIACS ରେ, ପ୍ରଥମ ୪ଟି ବିଭାଗ ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ ପରୋକ୍ଷ ପ୍ରଭାବ (Indirect Influence) କୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ | ଏଥିମଧ୍ୟରୁ ବିଭାଗ ୩ ହେଉଛି ଛାତ୍ରମାନଙ୍କର ବିଚାର ବା ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା କିମ୍ବା ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବା |

questions.question: According to David Ausubel's Assimilation Theory of Meaningful Verbal Learning, what type of subsumption occurs when a learner acquires new information that is an extension, elaboration, modification, or qualification of a previously learned concept?
questions.explanation: Correlative subsumption occurs when the new material is an extension, elaboration, modification, or qualification of previously learned information, rather than a direct illustration of it (which would be derivative subsumption).

or.question: ଡେଭିଡ୍ ଆସୁବେଲ୍ (David Ausubel) ଙ୍କ ସାର୍ଥକ ମୌଖିକ ଶିକ୍ଷଣର ଆତ୍ମୀକରଣ ସିଦ୍ଧାନ୍ତ (Assimilation Theory of Meaningful Verbal Learning) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଯେତେବେଳେ ଜଣେ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ନୂତନ ସୂଚନା ହାସଲ କରେ ଯାହା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଶିଖିଥିବା ଧାରଣାର ଏକ ସମ୍ପ୍ରସାରଣ, ବିସ୍ତାର, ସଂଶୋଧନ ବା ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ଅଟେ, ସେତେବେଳେ କେଉଁ ପ୍ରକାରର ସବ୍‌ସମ୍ପସନ୍ (Subsumption) ଘଟିଥାଏ?
or.explanation: କୋରେଲେଟିଭ୍ ସବ୍‌ସମ୍ପସନ୍ (Correlative Subsumption) ରେ, ନୂତନ ସୂଚନା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ବିଦ୍ୟମାନ ଥିବା ଜ୍ଞାନର ଏକ ସମ୍ପ୍ରସାରଣ, ସଂଶୋଧନ କିମ୍ବା ବିସ୍ତାର ଅଟେ, ଯାହା ପୂର୍ବ ଧାରଣାକୁ ଅଧିକ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରେ |

questions.question: Which Somavamsi ruler is credited with initiating the construction of the famous Lingaraja Temple at Bhubaneswar, which was later completed by his successor?
questions.explanation: The construction of the majestic Lingaraja Temple at Bhubaneswar was initiated by the Somavamsi king Yayati II (also known as Yayati Keshari) in the 11th century, and it was completed during the reign of his son and successor, Udyotakeshari.

or.question: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଲିଙ୍ଗରାଜ ମନ୍ଦିରର ନିର୍ମାଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କେଉଁ ସୋମବଂଶୀ ରାଜାଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା, ଯାହାକି ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ତାଙ୍କ ଉତ୍ତରାଧିକାରୀଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଲିଙ୍ଗରାଜ ମନ୍ଦିରର ନିର୍ମାଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଏକାଦଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀରେ ସୋମବଂଶୀ ରାଜା ଯଯାତି ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟଙ୍କ (ଯଯାତି କେଶରୀ) ଦ୍ୱାରା ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ଏହା ତାଙ୍କ ପୁତ୍ର ତଥା ଉତ୍ତରାଧିକାରୀ ଉଦ୍ୟୋତକେଶରୀଙ୍କ ଶାସନ କାଳରେ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: Who was the first Governor of the newly created Odisha Province when it was separated from Bihar on 1st April 1936?
questions.explanation: Sir John Austen Hubback was appointed as the first Governor of the newly created Odisha Province on April 1, 1936, and served in this position until 1941.

or.question: ୧ ଏପ୍ରିଲ ୧୯୩୬ ରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ବିହାରରୁ ପୃଥକ ହୋଇ ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ପ୍ରଦେଶ ଭାବରେ ଗଠିତ ହେବା ପରେ ଏହାର ପ୍ରଥମ ରାଜ୍ୟପାଳ କିଏ ହୋଇଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ନୂତନ ଭାବେ ଗଠିତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ରାଜ୍ୟପାଳ ଭାବରେ ସାର୍ ଜନ୍ ଅଷ୍ଟିନ୍ ହବାକ୍ ୧ ଏପ୍ରିଲ ୧୯୩୬ ରେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ସେ ୧୯୪୧ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଏହି ପଦବୀରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Who was the first female ruler of the Bhauma-Kara dynasty of ancient Odisha?
questions.explanation: Tribhuvana Mahadevi I was the first female ruler of the Bhauma-Kara dynasty of ancient Odisha. She ascended the throne in 845 AD after the death of her son Subhakaradeva III, with the backing of her father Rajamalla I of the Western Ganga dynasty.

or.question: ପ୍ରାଚୀନ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଭୌମକର ରାଜବଂଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ମହିଳା ଶାସିକା କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ତ୍ରିଭୁବନ ମହାଦେବୀ I ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଭୌମକର ରାଜବଂଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ମହିଳା ଶାସିକା ଥିଲେ। ନିଜ ପୁତ୍ର ଶୁଭାକରଦେବ III ଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପରେ ସେ ପଶ୍ଚିମ ଗଙ୍ଗ ବଂଶର ରାଜା ରାଜମଲ୍ଲ ୧ମ ଙ୍କ ସହାୟତାରେ ୮୪୫ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦରେ ସିଂହାସନ ଆରୋହଣ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Who was the first Prime Minister (Premier) of the newly formed Odisha Province in 1937?
questions.explanation: Maharaja Krushna Chandra Gajapati of Parlakhemundi served as the first Prime Minister (Premier) of the separate Odisha province from April 1, 1937, to July 19, 1937.

or.question: ୧୯୩୭ ମସିହାରେ ନବଗଠିତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ (ପ୍ରିମିୟର) କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡିର ମହାରାଜା କୃଷ୍ଣଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗଜପତି ୧ ଏପ୍ରିଲ ୧୯୩୭ ରୁ ୧୯ ଜୁଲାଇ ୧୯୩୭ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପ୍ରଦେଶର ପ୍ରଥମ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ (ପ୍ରିମିୟର) ଭାବରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Robert Browning's dramatic monologue "Bishop Blougram's Apology" (1855), who is the young, skeptical literary journalist with whom the Bishop is conversing over wine?
questions.explanation: In Browning's dramatic monologue "Bishop Blougram's Apology", the Bishop defends his faith and church career to a young, skeptical literary journalist named Gigadibs over dinner and wine.

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ବ୍ରାଉନିଂଙ୍କ ନାଟକୀୟ ଏକକୋକ୍ତି (dramatic monologue) "Bishop Blougram's Apology" (୧୮୫୫) ରେ, ବିଶପ୍ ମଦ୍ୟପାନ ସମୟରେ କେଉଁ ଯୁବ, ସନ୍ଦେହୀ ସାହିତ୍ୟିକ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକଙ୍କ ସହ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା କରୁଛନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: ବ୍ରାଉନିଂଙ୍କ ନାଟକୀୟ ଏକକୋକ୍ତି "Bishop Blougram's Apology" ରେ, ବିଶପ୍ ବ୍ଲୋଗ୍ରାମ ରାତ୍ରିଭୋଜନ ଏବଂ ମଦ୍ୟପାନ ସମୟରେ ଗିଗାଡିବ୍ସ ନାମକ ଜଣେ ଯୁବ, ସନ୍ଦେହୀ ସାହିତ୍ୟିକ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକଙ୍କ ନିକଟରେ ନିଜର ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ଏବଂ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚ କ୍ୟାରିୟରକୁ ରକ୍ଷା କରି ଯୁକ୍ତି ବାଢ଼ିଛନ୍ତି।

questions.question: In his 1970 work 'S/Z', Roland Barthes performs a detailed structural analysis of a short story by Honoré de Balzac. What is the title of this Balzac novella?
questions.explanation: Roland Barthes's 'S/Z' (1970) is a landmark text in post-structuralism that provides a meticulous, line-by-line reading of Honoré de Balzac's novella 'Sarrasine' (1830), dividing it into 561 lexias analyzed through five semiotic codes.

or.question: ରୋଲାଣ୍ଡ ବାର୍ଥେସ୍ (Roland Barthes) ତାଙ୍କର ୧୯୭୦ ମସିହାର କୃତି 'S/Z' ରେ ଓନୋରେ ଡି ବାଲଜାକ୍ (Honoré de Balzac) ଙ୍କର ଏକ କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଗଳ୍ପର ଗଠନମୂଳକ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ବାଲଜାକଙ୍କ ଏହି ଉପନ୍ୟାସିକା (novella) ର ଶୀର୍ଷକ କ’ଣ?
options: ଲା ପେଉ ଡି ଚାଗ୍ରିନ୍ (La Peau de chagrin)
or.explanation: ରୋଲାଣ୍ଡ ବାର୍ଥେସଙ୍କ 'S/Z' (୧୯୭୦) ହେଉଛି ଉତ୍ତର-ଗଠନମୂଳକବାଦ (post-structuralism) ର ଏକ ମାଇଲଖୁଣ୍ଟ ଗ୍ରନ୍ଥ, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ସେ ଓନୋରେ ଡି ବାଲଜାକଙ୍କ ଉପନ୍ୟାସିକା 'Sarrasine' (୧୮୩୦) ର ଏକ ସୂକ୍ଷ୍ମ, ଧାଡ଼ି-ବି-ଧାଡ଼ି ପଠନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଏହାକୁ ପାଞ୍ଚଟି ସେମିଓଟିକ୍ କୋଡ୍ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ୫୬୧ ଟି 'lexias' ରେ ବିଭକ୍ତ କରିଛନ୍ତି।

questions.question: Which Gajapati ruler of Odisha assumed the title of 'Gajapati Gaudesvara Navakoti Karnata Kalavargesvara'?
questions.explanation: Kapilendra Deva, the founder of the Suryavamsi Gajapati dynasty, assumed this grand title to commemorate his military victories over Bengal (Gauda), Vijayanagara (Karnata), and Bahmani (Kalavarga) kingdoms.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କେଉଁ ଗଜପତି ଶାସକ 'ଗଜପତି ଗୌଡ଼େଶ୍ୱର ନବକୋଟି କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟ କଳବର୍ଗେଶ୍ୱର' ଉପାଧି ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀ ଗଜପତି ରାଜବଂଶର ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାତା କପିଳେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଦେବ, ବଙ୍ଗଳା (ଗୌଡ଼), ବିଜୟନଗର (କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟ) ଏବଂ ବାହମନୀ (କଳବର୍ଗ) ସାମ୍ରାଜ୍ୟ ଉପରେ ନିଜର ସାମରିକ ବିଜୟର ସ୍ମୃତିସ୍ୱରୂପ ଏହି ଭବ୍ୟ ଉପାଧି ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: The historic 'Eram Massacre', also referred to as the Jallianwala Bagh of Odisha, took place during the Quit India Movement on which of the following dates?
questions.explanation: On September 28, 1942, British police opened fire on a peaceful gathering at Eram in Bhadrak district, leading to the death of 29 freedom fighters. This tragic event is known as the Jallianwala Bagh of Odisha.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଜାଲିଆନାୱାଲା ବାଗ୍ ଭାବରେ ପରିଚିତ ଐତିହାସିକ 'ଇରମ ଗଣହତ୍ୟା' ଭାରତ ଛାଡ଼ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସମୟରେ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ କେଉଁ ତାରିଖରେ ସଂଘଟିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ୨୮ ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ୧୯୪୨ ରେ, ଭଦ୍ରକ ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ଇରମଠାରେ ଏକ ଶାନ୍ତିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସଭା ଉପରେ ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ପୋଲିସ ଗୁଳି ଚଳାଇଥିଲା, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ୨୯ ଜଣ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନତା ସଂଗ୍ରାମୀ ପ୍ରାଣ ହରାଇଥିଲେ। ଏହି ଦୁଃଖଦ ଘଟଣା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଜାଲିଆନାୱାଲା ବାଗ୍ ଭାବରେ ଜଣାଶୁଣା।

questions.question: In Matthew Arnold's pastoral elegy 'Thyrsis', written to commemorate his friend Arthur Hugh Clough, which specific landmark of the Oxford countryside symbolizes the persistence of hope and the quest for truth?
questions.explanation: In 'Thyrsis', Matthew Arnold uses the 'signal-elm' on the hill-top as a central symbol of resilience, hope, and the continuing quest for intellectual and spiritual truth, indicating that as long as the tree stands, the ideal of the Scholar-Gipsy still lives.

or.question: ମାଥ୍ୟୁ ଆର୍ନୋଲ୍ଡଙ୍କ ପାଷ୍ଟୋରାଲ୍ ଏଲିଜି 'ଥାଇର୍ସିସ୍' (Thyrsis) ରେ, ଯାହା ତାଙ୍କ ବନ୍ଧୁ ଆର୍ଥର ହ୍ୟୁ କ୍ଲଫ୍‌ଙ୍କ ସ୍ମୃତିରେ ଲିଖିତ, ଅକ୍ସଫୋର୍ଡ ଗ୍ରାମାଞ୍ଚଳର କେଉଁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ଚିହ୍ନଟି ଆଶା ଏବଂ ସତ୍ୟର ଅନ୍ୱେଷଣର ସ୍ଥାୟୀତ୍ୱକୁ ପ୍ରତିପାଦିତ କରେ?
options: ପାହାଡ଼ ଉପରେ ଥିବା ସିଗନାଲ୍-ଏଲ୍ମ୍ ଗଛ (The Signal-elm on the hill)
or.explanation: ମାଥ୍ୟୁ ଆର୍ନୋଲ୍ଡଙ୍କ 'ଥାଇର୍ସିସ୍' କବିତାରେ, ପାହାଡ଼ ଉପରେ ଥିବା ସିଗନାଲ୍-ଏଲ୍ମ୍ (Signal-elm) ଗଛଟି ଆଶା ଏବଂ ସତ୍ୟର ଅନ୍ୱେଷଣର ପ୍ରତୀକ ଅଟେ। ଯେପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଏହି ଗଛଟି ଅଛି, ସେପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସ୍କଲାର-ଜିପ୍ସି ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କର ଆଦର୍ଶ ଜୀବିତ ଅଛି ବୋଲି କବି ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରନ୍ତି।

questions.question: In the opening section of 'Burnt Norton', the first of T. S. Eliot's 'Four Quartets', which bird guides the narrator into the rose-garden, urging them to find the 'echoes'?
questions.explanation: In the opening lines of 'Burnt Norton', it is the 'thrush' that invites and guides the narrator into the rose-garden with the words: 'Quick, said the bird, find them, find them / Round the corner.'

or.question: ଟି. ଏସ୍. ଏଲିଅଟ୍‌ଙ୍କ 'ଫୋର୍ କ୍ୱାର୍ଟେଟ୍ସ' (Four Quartets) ର ପ୍ରଥମ କବିତା 'ବର୍ଣ୍ଟ ନର୍ଟନ' (Burnt Norton) ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଭାଗରେ, କେଉଁ ପକ୍ଷୀ କଥକଙ୍କୁ ଗୋଲାପ ବଗିଚା (rose-garden) ଭିତରକୁ ବାଟ କଢ଼ାଇ ନେଇଥାଏ ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ 'ପ୍ରତିଧ୍ୱନି' (echoes) ଖୋଜିବାକୁ ପ୍ରବର୍ତ୍ତାଇ ଥାଏ?
or.explanation: ଟି. ଏସ୍. ଏଲିଅଟ୍‌ଙ୍କ 'ବର୍ଣ୍ଟ ନର୍ଟନ' କବିତାରେ, ଥ୍ରଶ୍ (Thrush) ପକ୍ଷୀଟି ହିଁ କଥକଙ୍କୁ ଗୋଲାପ ବଗିଚା ଭିତରକୁ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିବାକୁ ଏବଂ 'ପ୍ରତିଧ୍ୱନି' ଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଖୋଜିବାକୁ ଡାକିଥାଏ।

questions.question: In Daniel Stufflebeam's CIPP evaluation model, which of the following components is primarily concerned with identifying the strengths and weaknesses of the system, determining target audience needs, and defining the objectives of a program?
questions.explanation: In Stufflebeam's CIPP (Context, Input, Process, Product) model, Context Evaluation is used to assess needs, assets, and problems within a given environment to identify opportunities and define the goals/objectives of a program.

or.question: ଡାନିଏଲ୍ ଷ୍ଟଫଲ୍‌ବିମ୍‌ଙ୍କ CIPP ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ ମଡେଲରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ଉପାଦାନଟି ମୁଖ୍ୟତଃ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାର ସବଳତା ଓ ଦୁର୍ବଳତା ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିବା, ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟଭିତ୍ତିକ ଶ୍ରୋତାଙ୍କ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରଣ କରିବା ଏବଂ ଏକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ସ୍ଥିର କରିବା ସହିତ ଜଡ଼ିତ?
or.explanation: ଷ୍ଟଫଲ୍‌ବିମ୍‌ଙ୍କ CIPP (Context, Input, Process, Product) ମଡେଲରେ, ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ (Context Evaluation) ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି କୌଣସି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ପରିବେଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା, ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି ଏବଂ ସମସ୍ୟାଗୁଡ଼ିକର ଆକଳନ କରାଯାଏ ଯାହାଦ୍ୱାରା କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ସ୍ଥିର କରାଯାଇପାରିବ।

questions.question: According to Hilda Taba's Inductive Thinking Model of teaching, which of the following is the correct sequence of steps involved in the first cognitive task, 'Concept Formation'?
options: Listing items, Grouping items, Categorizing/Labeling categories
Identifying relationships, Explaining relationships, Drawing inferences
Predicting consequences, Explaining predictions, Verifying predictions
Analyzing data, Formulating hypotheses, Testing hypotheses
questions.explanation: Hilda Taba's Inductive Thinking Model consists of three cognitive tasks. The first cognitive task is 'Concept Formation', which comprises three sequential steps: (1) Enumeration or listing of data, (2) Grouping of data based on common attributes, and (3) Labeling or categorizing the groups.

or.question: ହିଲ୍ଡା ଟାବାଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନର 'ଆଗମନାତ୍ମକ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା ମଡେଲ' (Inductive Thinking Model) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ପ୍ରଥମ ଜ୍ଞାନାତ୍ମକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ 'ଧାରଣା ଗଠନ' (Concept Formation) ରେ ଜଡ଼ିତ ସୋପାନଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି?
options: ଆଇଟମଗୁଡିକର ତାଲିକା ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରିବା, ଆଇଟମଗୁଡିକୁ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀଭୁକ୍ତ କରିବା, ବର୍ଗୀକରଣ/ଲେବେଲିଂ କରିବା
ସମ୍ପର୍କ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିବା, ସମ୍ପର୍କ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କରିବା, ଅନୁମାନ କରିବା
ପରିଣାମ ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ କରିବା, ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କରିବା, ପୂର୍ବାନୁମାନ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବା
ତଥ୍ୟ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରିବା, ଅନୁକଳ୍ପନା ଗଠନ କରିବା, ଅନୁକଳ୍ପନା ପରୀକ୍ଷା କରିବା
or.explanation: ହିଲ୍ଡା ଟାବାଙ୍କ ଆଗମନାତ୍ମକ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା ମଡେଲରେ ତିନୋଟି ଜ୍ଞାନାତ୍ମକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ରହିଛି। ପ୍ରଥମ ଜ୍ଞାନାତ୍ମକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି 'ଧାରଣା ଗଠନ' (Concept Formation), ଯାହା ତିନୋଟି କ୍ରମିକ ସୋପାନକୁ ନେଇ ଗଠିତ: (୧) ତଥ୍ୟର ତାଲିକା ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରିବା, (୨) ସାଧାରଣ ଗୁଣ ଆଧାରରେ ତଥ୍ୟକୁ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀଭୁକ୍ତ କରିବା, ଏବଂ (୩) ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଲେବେଲ୍ ବା ବର୍ଗୀକରଣ କରିବା।

questions.question: Gandhiji's 'Nai Talim' (Basic Education) scheme of 1937 was first systematically formulated by a committee under the chairmanship of which of the following educationists?
questions.explanation: The scheme of Basic Education (popularly known as the Wardha Scheme) was prepared by a committee of educationists headed by Dr. Zakir Husain in 1937.

questions.question: In Rabindranath Tagore's educational philosophy, what is the primary significance of the concept of 'Tapovan' (Forest Hermitage)?
options: A site for strict physical asceticism and yoga
A natural setting conducive to the harmonious development of the soul in communion with nature
A vocational training center for rural handicrafts
A scientific laboratory for agricultural experiments
questions.explanation: Tagore highly valued the ancient Indian 'Tapovan' ideal of education, emphasizing that learning should happen in close proximity to nature to foster spiritual, emotional, and intellectual harmony.

questions.question: According to John Dewey's pragmatic philosophy, how is 'education' best defined?
options: Preparation for a future adult life
A process of acquiring pre-determined external knowledge
questions.explanation: Dewey defined education as the continuous reconstruction or reorganization of experience which adds to the meaning of experience and increases the ability to direct the course of subsequent experience.

questions.question: Friedrich Froebel coined the term 'Kindergarten'. What is the literal meaning of this German word?
questions.explanation: 'Kindergarten' literally translates from German to 'Children's garden' (Kinder = children, Garten = garden), reflecting Froebel's belief that children are like plants and teachers are like gardeners.

questions.question: In the Montessori Method, what does the term 'Absorbent Mind' specifically refer to?
options: The mental state of an adult during deep meditation
The child's innate capacity to effortlessly and unconsciously soak up knowledge from their environment
A structured teaching technique used to memorize mathematical tables
The process of evaluation through rigorous examination
questions.explanation: Maria Montessori used the term 'Absorbent Mind' to describe the unique mental capacity of young children (from birth to age 6) to absorb sensory details and knowledge from their surroundings naturally, without conscious effort.

questions.question: A student who consistently struggles with handwriting, spacing of letters, and fine motor coordination in writing is most likely exhibiting symptoms of which learning disability?
questions.explanation: Dysgraphia is a specific learning disability that affects writing abilities, manifested as difficulties with spelling, poor handwriting, and trouble putting thoughts on paper.

questions.question: Which neurodevelopmental condition is characterized by persistent patterns of inattention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity that interfere with functioning or development, requiring instructional accommodations like frequent breaks and visual schedules?
questions.explanation: ADHD is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by persistent inattention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity that affects executive functioning and academic performance in school settings.

questions.question: Under the Rights of Persons with Disabilities (RPwD) Act, 2016 in India, the number of specified benchmark disabilities was increased from 7 (as per the 1995 Act) to how many?
questions.explanation: The RPwD Act, 2016 increased the number of recognized disabilities from 7 to 21, including conditions like mental illness, autism spectrum disorder, cerebral palsy, muscular dystrophy, chronic neurological conditions, and learning disabilities.

questions.question: Which educational setting is characterized by placing children with special needs in regular classrooms alongside their typically developing peers, while providing necessary support and adapting the curriculum to suit all learners?
questions.explanation: Inclusive education is a model where all students, regardless of their challenges or differences, are integrated into general education classrooms, with curriculum modifications, physical adaptations, and support systems tailored to diverse needs.

questions.question: What does the acronym 'DIKSHA', the national portal for school education in India launched in 2017, stand for?
options: Direct Interactive Knowledge Sharing Hub for Academics
Digital Information for Knowledge and Skill Harnessing
Digital Initiative for Knowledge and Smart High-tech Classrooms
questions.explanation: DIKSHA stands for 'Digital Infrastructure for Knowledge Sharing'. It is a national platform for school education initiated by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, to provide digital learning resources for teachers and students.

questions.question: In the TPACK framework of educational technology integration, which component represents the intersection where teachers understand how technology can change the way concepts are taught and learned?
questions.explanation: Technological Pedagogical Knowledge (TPK) describes an understanding of how teaching and learning can change when particular technologies are used in particular ways, independent of subject-matter content.

questions.question: In the SAMR model of technology integration developed by Ruben Puentedura, what do the letters 'S' and 'R' stand for?
questions.explanation: The SAMR model stands for Substitution, Augmentation, Modification, and Redefinition, representing different levels of technology integration in the classroom.

questions.question: Which curriculum model rejects fixed, pre-determined behavioral objectives, arguing instead that education should focus on the quality of learning processes, teacher judgment, and student inquiry as pioneered by Lawrence Stenhouse?
questions.explanation: Lawrence Stenhouse proposed the Process Model of curriculum development, which emphasizes the process of learning, teacher research, and student inquiry rather than pre-specified product outcomes or strict behavioral objectives.

questions.question: Which approach to counselling, primarily associated with Carl Rogers, places the client at the center of the therapeutic process, emphasizing unconditional positive regard, empathy, and congruence?
questions.explanation: Carl Rogers developed Client-Centered or Non-Directive Counselling, where the counselor provides a supportive environment with empathy and unconditional positive regard, allowing the client to take the lead in self-actualization.

questions.question: Which type of guidance is specifically directed towards helping individuals choose a career path, prepare for it, enter it, and progress within it?
questions.explanation: Vocational guidance is the process of assisting an individual to choose an occupation, prepare for it, enter upon it, and progress in it, aligning personal abilities and interests with occupational opportunities.

questions.question: In Robert Browning's dramatic monologue "Fra Lippo Lippi", who is the Florentine patron that the speaker mentions having worked for, who ultimately protects him from the guards?
questions.explanation: In Robert Browning's poem "Fra Lippo Lippi", the monk-painter Lippo is caught by the Florentine night watch. He secures his release by revealing that he is in the employ of the powerful Cosimo de' Medici ("Cosimo of the Medici").

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ବ୍ରାଉନିଂଙ୍କ ନାଟ୍ୟ ଏକକୋକ୍ତି (dramatic monologue) "ଫ୍ରା ଲିପ୍ପୋ ଲିପ୍ପି" (Fra Lippo Lippi) ରେ, ବକ୍ତା କେଉଁ ଫ୍ଲୋରେଣ୍ଟାଇନ୍ ପୃଷ୍ଠପୋଷକଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ କାମ କରିଥିବା କଥା ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଛନ୍ତି, ଯିଏ ଶେଷରେ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଜଗୁଆଳିମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ରକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: ରବର୍ଟ ବ୍ରାଉନିଂଙ୍କ କବିତା "ଫ୍ରା ଲିପ୍ପୋ ଲିପ୍ପି" ରେ, ସନ୍ନ୍ୟାସୀ-ଚିତ୍ରକାର ଲିପ୍ପିଙ୍କୁ ଫ୍ଲୋରେନ୍ସର ରାତ୍ରି ଜଗୁଆଳିମାନେ ଧରିଥିଲେ। ସେ ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ କୋସିମୋ ଡେ ମେଡିସିଙ୍କ ଅଧୀନରେ କାମ କରୁଛନ୍ତି ବୋଲି ପ୍ରକାଶ କରି ନିଜକୁ ମୁକ୍ତ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In her influential 1988 essay "Can the Subaltern Speak?", Gayatri Chakravorty Spivak criticizes which two French intellectuals for neglecting the international division of labor and recreating the colonial subject?
questions.explanation: In "Can the Subaltern Speak?", Spivak begins with a critique of a conversation between Michel Foucault and Gilles Deleuze, arguing that their theories of power and representation fail to account for the subaltern in the international division of labor, thereby inadvertently reinstating a sovereign Western subject.

or.question: ଗାୟତ୍ରୀ ଚକ୍ରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସ୍ପିଭାକ୍ ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ୧୯୮୮ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ "କ୍ୟାନ୍ ଦି ସବ୍‌ଅଲ୍ଟର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସ୍ପିକ୍?" (Can the Subaltern Speak?) ରେ ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଶ୍ରମ ବିଭାଜନକୁ ଅବହେଳା କରିବା ଏବଂ ଔପନିବେଶିକ ବିଷୟକୁ ପୁନର୍ବାର ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବା ପାଇଁ କେଉଁ ଦୁଇଜଣ ଫରାସୀ ବୁଦ୍ଧିଜୀବୀଙ୍କୁ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି?
options: ଜାକ୍ ଡେରିଡା ଏବଂ ଜିନ୍-ଫ୍ରାନ୍ସୱା ଲିଓଟାର୍ଡ (Jacques Derrida and Jean-François Lyotard)
ମିଶେଲ ଫୁକୋ ଏବଂ ଗିଲ୍ସ ଡେଲ୍ୟୁଜ୍ (Michel Foucault and Gilles Deleuze)
ରୋଲାଣ୍ଡ ବାର୍ଥେସ ଏବଂ ଜାକ୍ ଲାକାନ୍ (Roland Barthes and Jacques Lacan)
ଲୁଇସ ଅଲଥୁସର ଏବଂ ପିଏର ବୋର୍ଡିଉ (Louis Althusser and Pierre Bourdieu)
or.explanation: "କ୍ୟାନ୍ ଦି ସବ୍‌ଅଲ୍ଟର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସ୍ପିକ୍?" ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧରେ, ସ୍ପିଭାକ୍ ମିଶେଲ ଫୁକୋ ଏବଂ ଗିଲ୍ସ ଡେଲ୍ୟୁଜ୍‌ଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଏକ ଆଲୋଚନାର ସମାଲୋଚନାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ ଯୁକ୍ତି ବାଢ଼ିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର କ୍ଷମତା ଏବଂ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ୱର ସିଦ୍ଧାନ୍ତ ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଶ୍ରମ ବିଭାଜନରେ ସବ୍‌ଅଲ୍ଟର୍ଣ୍ଣଙ୍କୁ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ କରିବାରେ ବିଫଳ ହୋଇଥାଏ, ଯାହାଫଳରେ ଅଜାଣତରେ ଏକ ସାର୍ବଭୌମ ପାଶ୍ଚାତ୍ୟ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁକୁ ପୁନର୍ବାର ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରାଯାଏ।

questions.question: Robert Gagne proposed a hierarchy of eight levels of learning. Which of the following represents the lowest level of learning in Gagne's hierarchy?
questions.explanation: In Robert Gagne's hierarchy of learning, the lowest level (Level 1) is 'Signal learning' (which corresponds to classical conditioning), while the highest level (Level 8) is 'Problem-solving'.

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ଗ୍ୟାଗ୍ନେ (Robert Gagne) ଶିକ୍ଷଣର ଆଠଟି ସ୍ତରର ଏକ କ୍ରମିକ ସୋପାନ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ କରିଥିଲେ। ଗ୍ୟାଗ୍ନେଙ୍କ ସୋପାନରେ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ଶିକ୍ଷଣର ସର୍ବନିମ୍ନ ସ୍ତରକୁ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ବ କରେ?
or.explanation: ରବର୍ଟ ଗ୍ୟାଗ୍ନେଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷଣର କ୍ରମିକ ସୋପାନରେ, ସର୍ବନିମ୍ନ ସ୍ତର (ସ୍ତର ୧) ହେଉଛି 'ସାଙ୍କେତିକ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ' (Signal learning), ଯାହା ପାଭଲଭ୍‌ଙ୍କ କ୍ଲାସିକାଲ୍ କଣ୍ଡିସନିଂ ଉପରେ ଆଧାରିତ।

questions.question: The Justice Verma Commission (JVC) on Teacher Education was constituted by the Supreme Court of India in 2011. Which of the following was a major recommendation of this commission?
options: Reducing the duration of B.Ed. and M.Ed. programmes to one year to meet teacher demand
Enhancing the duration of B.Ed. and M.Ed. programmes to two years and establishing a teacher education registry
Entrusting the entire teacher education regulation to the state universities instead of NCTE
Replacing all physical teacher training institutes with open and distance learning modes
questions.explanation: The Justice Verma Commission (2012 report) recommended increasing the duration of B.Ed. and M.Ed. programmes to two years to improve the quality of teacher education in India, and emphasized strict regulatory oversight.

or.question: ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଉପରେ ଜଷ୍ଟିସ ବର୍ମା କମିଶନ (JVC) ୨୦୧୧ ମସିହାରେ ଭାରତର ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ନ୍ୟାୟାଳୟଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଗଠିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏହି କମିଶନଙ୍କର ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ସୁପାରିଶ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ଥିଲା?
options: ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଚାହିଦା ପୂରଣ ପାଇଁ ବି.ଇଡି. ଏବଂ ଏମ.ଇଡି. ପାଠ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଅବଧିକୁ ଏକ ବର୍ଷକୁ ହ୍ରାସ କରିବା
ବି.ଇଡି. ଏବଂ ଏମ.ଇଡି. ପାଠ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଅବଧିକୁ ଦୁଇ ବର୍ଷକୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବା ଏବଂ ଏକ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଞ୍ଜିକରଣ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିବା
ଏନସିଟିଇ (NCTE) ବଦଳରେ ସମଗ୍ର ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଶିକ୍ଷା ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣକୁ ରାଜ୍ୟ ବିଶ୍ୱବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରିବା
ସମସ୍ତ ଭୌତିକ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ପ୍ରଶିକ୍ଷଣ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନକୁ ମୁକ୍ତ ଏବଂ ଦୂର ଶିକ୍ଷା ମାଧ୍ୟମ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବଦଳାଇବା
or.explanation: ଜଷ୍ଟିସ ବର୍ମା କମିଶନ (୨୦୧୨ ରିପୋର୍ଟ) ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଶିକ୍ଷାର ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଁ ବି.ଇଡି. ଏବଂ ଏମ.ଇଡି. ପାଠ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଅବଧିକୁ ଦୁଇ ବର୍ଷ କରିବାକୁ ସୁପାରିଶ କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ଏହାର ନିୟାମକ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାକୁ କଡ଼ାକଡ଼ି କରିବା ଉପରେ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଦେଇଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Who was the editor of 'Utkal Deepika', the first weekly Odia newspaper, which started publication in 1866?
questions.explanation: 'Utkal Deepika', first published on August 4, 1866, was the first Odia weekly newspaper. It was edited by Gouri Shankar Ray and printed at the Cuttack Printing Company. It played a pivotal role during the Na'Anka Famine and the Odia language movement.

or.question: ୧୮୬୬ ମସିହାରେ ପ୍ରକାଶିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରଥମ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ସାପ୍ତାହିକ ସମ୍ବାଦପତ୍ର 'ଉତ୍କଳ ଦୀପିକା'ର ସମ୍ପାଦକ କିଏ ଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ୧୮୬୬ ମସିହା ଅଗଷ୍ଟ ୪ ତାରିଖରେ ପ୍ରଥମ କରି ପ୍ରକାଶିତ 'ଉତ୍କଳ ଦୀପିକା' ଥିଲା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ପ୍ରଥମ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ସାପ୍ତାହିକ ସମ୍ବାଦପତ୍ର। ଏହାର ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଗୌରୀଶଙ୍କର ରାୟ ଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ଏହା କଟକ ପ୍ରିଣ୍ଟିଂ କମ୍ପାନୀରୁ ମୁଦ୍ରିତ ହେଉଥିଲା। ଏହା ନଅଙ୍କ ଦୁର୍ଭିକ୍ଷ ଏବଂ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଭାଷା ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସମୟରେ ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭୂମିକା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲା।

questions.question: Which famous waterfall in Odisha, formed by the Machhkund River, is also known as 'Matsya Tirtha'?
questions.explanation: The Duduma Waterfall, located in the Koraput district of Odisha, is formed by the Machhkund River. It is a major source of hydroelectric power and is also traditionally known as 'Matsya Tirtha'.

or.question: ମାଛକୁଣ୍ଡ ନଦୀ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥିବା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କେଉଁ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଜଳପ୍ରପାତ 'ମତ୍ସ୍ୟ ତୀର୍ଥ' ଭାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଜଣାଶୁଣା?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କୋରାପୁଟ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ଡୁଡୁମା ଜଳପ୍ରପାତ ମାଛକୁଣ୍ଡ ନଦୀ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି। ଏହା ଜଳବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ଶକ୍ତିର ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଉତ୍ସ ଏବଂ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ଭାବରେ ଏହା 'ମତ୍ସ୍ୟ ତୀର୍ଥ' ଭାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପରିଚିତ।

questions.topic: History of Ancient and Medieval Odisha
questions.question: Which ruler of the Eastern Ganga dynasty shifted the capital of his kingdom from Kalinganagara to Abhinava Varanasi Kataka (modern Cuttack)?
questions.explanation: Anangabhima Deva III (reign 1211–1238 AD) founded the city of Abhinava Varanasi Kataka (modern Cuttack) and shifted his capital there from Kalinganagara for better strategic and administrative control.

or.question: ପୂର୍ବ ଗଙ୍ଗ ବଂଶର କେଉଁ ଶାସକ ନିଜ ସାମ୍ରାଜ୍ୟର ରାଜଧାନୀକୁ କଳିଙ୍ଗନଗରରୁ ଅଭିନବ ବାରାଣସୀ କଟକ (ଆଧୁନିକ କଟକ) କୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତରିତ କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ତୃତୀୟ ଅନଙ୍ଗଭୀମ ଦେବ (୧୨୧୧-୧୨୩୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦ) ଉତ୍ତମ ରଣନୀତିକ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ ପାଇଁ ନିଜର ରାଜଧାନୀକୁ କଳିଙ୍ଗନଗରରୁ ଅଭିନବ ବାରାଣସୀ କଟକ (ଆଧୁନିକ କଟକ) କୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତରିତ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Who was appointed as the first Commissioner of Orissa (Cuttack Division) when the office of the Commissioner was created in 1818?
questions.explanation: Following the Paika Rebellion and subsequent administrative restructuring by the British East India Company, the office of the Commissioner of Cuttack (Orissa Division) was created in 1818, and Robert Ker was appointed as its first Commissioner.

or.question: ୧୮୧୮ ମସିହାରେ ଯେତେବେଳେ କମିଶନରଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରାଯାଇଥିଲା, ଓଡ଼ିଶା (କଟକ ବିଭାଗ) ର ପ୍ରଥମ କମିଶନର ଭାବରେ କାହାକୁ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ପାଇକ ବିଦ୍ରୋହ ଏବଂ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ଇଷ୍ଟ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ କମ୍ପାନୀ ଦ୍ୱାରା ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ ପୁନର୍ଗଠନ ପରେ, ୧୮୧୮ ମସିହାରେ କଟକ (ଓଡ଼ିଶା ବିଭାଗ) ର କମିଶନରଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରାଯାଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ରବର୍ଟ କେର୍‌ଙ୍କୁ ଏହାର ପ୍ରଥମ କମିଶନର ଭାବରେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: In the acronym 'PARAKH', the National Assessment Centre proposed under the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, what does the second letter 'A' stand for?
questions.explanation: PARAKH stands for Performance Assessment, Review, and Analysis of Knowledge for Holistic Development. The first 'A' stands for Assessment, and the second 'A' stands for Analysis.

questions.question: In the cyclical model of Action Research proposed by Stephen Kemmis and Robin McTaggart, which of the following represents the correct sequential order of phases?
questions.explanation: The classic action research cycle formulated by Kemmis and McTaggart consists of four steps in order: Plan, Act, Observe, and Reflect.

questions.question: Under Section 12(1)(c) of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education (RTE) Act, 2009, what is the mandatory minimum percentage of reservation for children belonging to weaker sections and disadvantaged groups in private unaided schools at the entry-level class?
questions.explanation: Section 12(1)(c) of the RTE Act mandates that private unaided schools must reserve at least 25% of their entry-level seats for children from economically weaker sections and disadvantaged groups.

questions.question: If a distribution of standardized test scores has a mean of 60 and a standard deviation of 8, what will be the corresponding T-score for a student who obtains a raw score of 76?
questions.explanation: First, find the z-score: z = (Raw Score - Mean) / SD = (76 - 60) / 8 = 16 / 8 = 2. Then, convert to T-score using the formula: T = 50 + 10(z) = 50 + 10(2) = 70.

questions.question: Jacob Kounin identified several dimensions of effective classroom management. Which term describes a teacher's ability to correct misbehavior in one student in a way that positively influences the behavior of other nearby students?
questions.explanation: The 'Ripple Effect' is Kounin's term for the phenomenon where a teacher's handling of misbehavior by one student influences the behavior of other students who are observing the interaction.

questions.question: The National Curriculum Framework (NCF) 2005 was formulated based on the recommendations of which famous committee report?
options: Yash Pal Committee Report (Learning Without Burden)
questions.explanation: The formulation of NCF 2005 was highly guided by the recommendations of the Yash Pal Committee Report (1993) titled 'Learning Without Burden'.

questions.question: In the context of language acquisition theories, which scholar proposed the 'Critical Period Hypothesis' (CPH), suggesting that there is a biologically determined window of time during which human beings can acquire a first language natively?
questions.explanation: The Critical Period Hypothesis was popularised by linguist and neurologist Eric Lenneberg in 1967 in his book 'Biological Foundations of Language'.

questions.question: In the cognitive psychology of memory, what is the term used when newly learned information interferes with the retrieval of previously learned information?
questions.explanation: Retroactive interference occurs when newly acquired information disrupts or inhibits the recall of older, previously learned information.

questions.question: Which level of measurement (scale) is characterized by having an absolute or true zero point, allowing for meaningful ratio comparisons?
questions.explanation: A ratio scale possesses all the properties of nominal, ordinal, and interval scales, along with an absolute (true) zero point.

questions.question: In the multi-store model of memory proposed by Atkinson and Shiffrin, what is the estimated capacity and duration of the sensory register for visual information (iconic memory)?
options: Limited capacity, duration of about 15 to 30 seconds
Large capacity, duration of less than a second (about 0.5 seconds)
Large capacity, duration of 3 to 4 seconds
questions.explanation: Iconic memory (visual sensory register) has a large capacity but a very brief duration, lasting only about 0.5 seconds before decaying.

questions.question: Which leadership style in classroom management is characterized by a 'hands-off' approach, where the teacher provides little to no direction, leaving students to make all decisions?
questions.explanation: A laissez-faire classroom management style is passive and non-directive, permitting students to do as they please with minimal adult intervention.

questions.question: NEP 2020 proposes the establishment of a 'National Educational Technology Forum' (NETF) to provide a platform for the free exchange of ideas on the use of technology. What is the designated structural status of NETF?
questions.explanation: NEP 2020 states that the National Educational Technology Forum (NETF) will be created as an autonomous body to facilitate decision-making on technology deployment.

questions.question: Under Section 21 of the RTE Act 2009, a School Management Committee (SMC) must be constituted in every government school. What percentage of the SMC members must be parents or guardians of the children?
questions.explanation: The RTE Act mandates that at least three-fourths (75%) of the members of the School Management Committee (SMC) must be parents or guardians of the pupils.

questions.question: According to Stephen Krashen's Monitor Model of second language acquisition, which hypothesis states that comprehensible input is most effective when it is one step beyond the learner's current stage of linguistic competence?
questions.explanation: The Input Hypothesis (i+1) states that language acquisition occurs when learners receive comprehensible input that is slightly above their current level of competence.

questions.question: Under the National Curriculum Framework for School Education (NCF-SE) 2023, the 'Pancha Kosha' concept from Indian tradition is utilized to define holistic development. Which of the following components of Pancha Kosha represents the 'intellectual/cognitive' domain?
questions.explanation: According to the Pancha Kosha framework adopted in NCF-SE 2023, Vijnanamaya Kosha represents the intellect/wisdom layer (cognitive domain). Annamaya represents physical, Pranamaya represents life force, and Manomaya represents mind/emotions.

questions.question: At the beginning of William Langland's 14th-century allegorical poem *Piers Plowman*, where does the narrator, Will, fall asleep and have his first vision?
questions.explanation: The prologue of *Piers Plowman* begins with the narrator wandering on the Malvern Hills ('on Malverne hulles'), where he falls asleep by a stream and experiences his first vision of a 'field full of folk'.

or.question: ୱିଲିୟମ୍ ଲାଙ୍ଗଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡଙ୍କ ଚତୁର୍ଦ୍ଦଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ରୂପକ କାବ୍ୟ *Piers Plowman* ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭରେ, ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନାକାରୀ 'ୱିଲ୍' କେଉଁ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଶୋଇପଡନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରଥମ ସ୍ୱପ୍ନ ଦେଖନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: *Piers Plowman* ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଭାଗରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନାକାରୀ ମାଲଭର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହିଲ୍ସ (Malvern Hills) ରେ ଏକ ଝରଣା କୂଳରେ ଶୋଇପଡନ୍ତି, ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ସେ ଲୋକମାନଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଏକ ସୁନ୍ଦର ପଡ଼ିଆର ('field full of folk') ପ୍ରଥମ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ଦେଖନ୍ତି।

questions.question: In Northrop Frye's seminal work *Anatomy of Criticism* (1957), which season is mythically associated with the archetype/genre of Tragedy?
questions.explanation: In Northrop Frye's 'Archetypal Criticism: Theory of Myths', he associates the four seasons with four distinct narrative categories (mythoi): Spring with Comedy, Summer with Romance, Autumn with Tragedy, and Winter with Irony and Satire.

or.question: ନର୍ଥ୍ରୋପ୍ ଫ୍ରାଇଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ପୁସ୍ତକ *Anatomy of Criticism* (1957) ରେ, କେଉଁ ଋତୁକୁ କାଳ୍ପନିକ ଭାବରେ ଟ୍ରାଜେଡି (Tragedy) ର ଆର୍କିଟାଇପ୍/ଶୈଳୀ ସହିତ ଜଡ଼ିତ କରାଯାଇଛି?
or.explanation: ନର୍ଥ୍ରୋପ୍ ଫ୍ରାଇଙ୍କ 'Archetypal Criticism: Theory of Myths' ରେ, ସେ ଚାରୋଟି ଋତୁକୁ ଚାରୋଟି ଆର୍କିଟାଇପାଲ୍ ଶୈଳୀ (mythoi) ସହିତ ଯୋଡିଛନ୍ତି: ବସନ୍ତକୁ କମେଡି (Comedy), ଗ୍ରୀଷ୍ମକୁ ରୋମାନ୍ସ (Romance), ଶରତକୁ ଟ୍ରାଜେଡି (Tragedy), ଏବଂ ଶୀତକୁ ଆଇରନି ଓ ସାଟାୟାର୍ (Irony and Satire) ସହିତ।

questions.question: In Robert Stake's Countenance Model of curriculum evaluation, what are the three bodies of information (or phases) that must be analyzed?
questions.explanation: Robert Stake's Countenance Model of evaluation emphasizes three phases of data: Antecedents (conditions existing prior to instruction), Transactions (the successive interactions during the educational process), and Outcomes (the consequences or achievements of the program).

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ଷ୍ଟେକଙ୍କ ପାଠ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନର 'କାଉଣ୍ଟେନାନ୍ସ ମଡେଲ' (Countenance Model) ରେ, ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରାଯିବାକୁ ଥିବା ତିନୋଟି ମୁଖ୍ୟ ତଥ୍ୟ ସମୂହ (ବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ) କଣ ଅଟେ?
options: ପୂର୍ବବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଅବସ୍ଥା, କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ଏବଂ ପରିଣାମ (Antecedents, Transactions, and Outcomes)
ନିବେଶ, ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଏବଂ ଉତ୍ପାଦ (Input, Process, and Product)
ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ, ନିବେଶ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା (Context, Input, and Process)
ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ, କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ଏବଂ ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ (Objectives, Activities, and Evaluation)
or.explanation: ରବର୍ଟ ଷ୍ଟେକଙ୍କ କାଉଣ୍ଟେନାନ୍ସ ମଡେଲ୍ ପାଠ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ ପାଇଁ ତିନୋଟି ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟର ତଥ୍ୟକୁ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଦେଇଥାଏ: ପୂର୍ବବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଅବସ୍ଥା (Antecedents - ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଥିବା ସ୍ଥିତି), କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ (Transactions - ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ସମୟରେ ହେଉଥିବା ପାରସ୍ପରିକ କ୍ରିୟା), ଏବଂ ପରିଣାମ (Outcomes - କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ଶେଷ ଫଳାଫଳ)।

questions.question: According to David Ausubel's theory of meaningful reception learning, when new information is an extension, elaboration, modification, or qualification of previously learned information, which type of subsumption occurs?
questions.explanation: In Ausubel's theory, Correlative Subsumption occurs when new material is integrated into an existing cognitive structure as an extension, modification, or qualification of previously learned concepts. Derivative Subsumption, by contrast, is when the new material is just a direct example or illustration of an already established concept.
