or.question: ଡେଭିଡ୍ ଅସୁବେଲଙ୍କ ଅର୍ଥପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଗ୍ରହଣ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ (Meaningful Reception Learning) ତତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଯେତେବେଳେ ନୂତନ ସୂଚନା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଶିଖିଥିବା ଜ୍ଞାନର ଏକ ସମ୍ପ୍ରସାରଣ, ବିସ୍ତାରଣ, ରୂପାନ୍ତରଣ କିମ୍ବା ସଂଶୋଧନ ଅଟେ, ସେତେବେଳେ କେଉଁ ପ୍ରକାରର ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତୀକରଣ (Subsumption) ଘଟିଥାଏ?
or.explanation: ଅସୁବେଲଙ୍କ ତତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ସହସମ୍ବନ୍ଧୀୟ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତୀକରଣ (Correlative Subsumption) ସେତେବେଳେ ହୋଇଥାଏ ଯେତେବେଳେ ନୂତନ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଥିବା ଜ୍ଞାନର ପରିମାର୍ଜନ କିମ୍ବା ସଂଶୋଧନ କରିଥାଏ। ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ, ବ୍ୟୁତପନ୍ନ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତୀକରଣ (Derivative Subsumption) ରେ ନୂତନ ସୂଚନା କେବଳ ପୂର୍ବ ଧାରଣାର ଏକ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଉଦାହରଣ ହୋଇଥାଏ।

questions.question: Which Ganga Dynasty ruler is credited with shifting the capital of the empire from Kalinganagara to Abhinava Varanasi Kataka (modern Cuttack)?
questions.explanation: Anangabhima Deva III (1211–1238 CE) founded the city of Abhinava Varanasi Kataka at the bifurcation of the Mahanadi and Kathajodi rivers and shifted his capital there from Kalinganagara in the early 13th century.

or.question: କେଉଁ ଗଙ୍ଗବଂଶର ଶାସକ ସାମ୍ରାଜ୍ୟର ରାଜଧାନୀକୁ କଳିଙ୍ଗନଗରରୁ ଅଭିନବ ବାରାଣସୀ କଟକ (ଆଧୁନିକ କଟକ)କୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରିଥିବା ଶ୍ରେୟ ପାଆନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: ଅନଙ୍ଗଭୀମ ଦେବ ତୃତୀୟ (୧୨୧୧-୧୨୩୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦ) ମହାନଦୀ ଏବଂ କାଠଯୋଡ଼ି ନଦୀର ଦ୍ୱିଭାଜନ ସ୍ଥଳରେ ଅଭିନବ ବାରାଣସୀ କଟକ ସହର ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ୧୩ଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭରେ ନିଜ ରାଜଧାନୀକୁ କଳିଙ୍ଗନଗରରୁ ସେଠାକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In which year was Sambalpur annexed by the British Empire under the provisions of the 'Doctrine of Lapse' formulated by Lord Dalhousie?
questions.explanation: Sambalpur was annexed by the British East India Company in 1849 under the Doctrine of Lapse after the ruler Raja Narayan Singh died without leaving a direct male heir.

or.question: ଲର୍ଡ ଡେଲହାଉସିଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ପ୍ରଣୀତ 'ସ୍ୱତ୍ୱଲୋପ ନୀତି' (Doctrine of Lapse) ର ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ କେଉଁ ବର୍ଷ ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ସାମ୍ରାଜ୍ୟ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମ୍ବଲପୁରକୁ ଅକ୍ତିଆର କରାଯାଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ରାଜା ନାରାୟଣ ସିଂହ କୌଣସି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପୁତ୍ର ଉତ୍ତରାଧିକାରୀ ନରଖି ମୃତ୍ୟୁବରଣ କରିବା ପରେ ୧୮୪୯ ମସିହାରେ ସ୍ୱତ୍ୱଲୋପ ନୀତି ଅଧୀନରେ ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ଇଷ୍ଟ ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ କମ୍ପାନୀ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମ୍ବଲପୁରକୁ ସାମ୍ରାଜ୍ୟଭୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: The historic Battle of Gohiratikiri (1568 AD), which led to the downfall of the last independent Hindu kingdom of Odisha under Mukunda Deva, was fought in which of the following modern-day districts of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Battle of Gohiratikiri was fought in 1568 AD between the forces of Mukunda Deva (the last independent ruler of Odisha) and the Bengal Sultanate led by Kalapahad. Gohiratikiri is located in the modern-day Bhadrak district of Odisha.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଶେଷ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନ ହିନ୍ଦୁ ଶାସକ ମୁକୁନ୍ଦ ଦେବଙ୍କ ପତନର କାରଣ ସାଜିଥିବା ଐତିହାସିକ ଗୋହିରାଟିକିରି ଯୁଦ୍ଧ (୧୫୬୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦ) ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର କେଉଁ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଗୋହିରାଟିକିରି ଯୁଦ୍ଧ ୧୫୬୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଶେଷ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନ ଶାସକ ମୁକୁନ୍ଦ ଦେବ ଏବଂ କଳାପାହାଡ଼ଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ୱରେ ବଙ୍ଗଳାର ସୁଲତାନଙ୍କ ସେନା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଗୋହିରାଟିକିରି ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଭଦ୍ରକ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ।

questions.topic: Ancient and Medieval History of Odisha
questions.question: According to historical traditions, which Somavamshi ruler performed the famous 'Dasaswamedha Yajna' on the banks of the Baitarani River in Jajpur and invited ten thousand Brahmins from Kannauj?
questions.explanation: King Yayati I (Yayati Kesari) of the Somavamshi dynasty is traditionally credited with performing the Dasaswamedha Yajna on the banks of the Baitarani River in Jajpur. To conduct this grand sacrifice, he invited ten thousand Vedic Brahmins from Kannauj, who subsequently settled in Odisha.

or.question: ଐତିହାସିକ ପରମ୍ପରା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, କେଉଁ ସୋମବଂଶୀ ଶାସକ ଯାଜପୁରର ବୈତରଣୀ ନଦୀ କୂଳରେ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ 'ଦଶାଶ୍ୱମେଧ ଯଜ୍ଞ' ସମ୍ପାଦନ କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ କନୌଜରୁ ଦଶ ହଜାର ବ୍ରାହ୍ମଣଙ୍କୁ ନିମନ୍ତ୍ରଣ କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ସୋମବଂଶର ରାଜା ଯଯାତି ପ୍ରଥମ (ଯଯାତି କେଶରୀ) ଯାଜପୁରର ବୈତରଣୀ ନଦୀ କୂଳରେ ଦଶାଶ୍ୱମେଧ ଯଜ୍ଞ କରିଥିବା ଜଣାଯାଏ। ଏହି ମହାନ ଯଜ୍ଞ ପରିଚାଳନା ପାଇଁ ସେ କନୌଜରୁ ଦଶ ହଜାର ବୈଦିକ ବ୍ରାହ୍ମଣଙ୍କୁ ନିମନ୍ତ୍ରଣ କରିଥିଲେ, ଯେଉଁମାନେ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶାରେ ବସବାସ କଲେ।

questions.question: In Charles Spearman's two-factor theory of intelligence, what does the 's' factor represent?
options: Specific ability unique to a particular task
Social intelligence required for interpersonal relations
questions.explanation: Charles Spearman proposed the two-factor theory of intelligence, which posits that intellectual performance depends on a general cognitive factor ('g' factor) and specific factors ('s' factors) unique to individual tasks.

questions.question: According to David McClelland's Theory of Needs, individuals who are strongly motivated by the desire to influence, guide, or control others are said to have a high need for which of the following?
questions.explanation: McClelland's Need Theory identifies three primary motivators: Achievement, Affiliation, and Power. The need for power (nPower) drives individuals to influence, control, and lead others.

questions.question: Which of the following personality assessment techniques utilizes 10 symmetrical inkblots to evaluate an individual's personality structure and emotional functioning?
questions.explanation: The Rorschach Inkblot Test is a projective psychological assessment method consisting of 10 standardized symmetrical inkblots designed to evaluate personality characteristics and unconscious impulses.

questions.question: In the revised version of Bloom's Taxonomy (Anderson & Krathwohl, 2001), which cognitive process represents the highest level of complexity?
questions.explanation: In the 2001 revision of Bloom's Taxonomy, the cognitive domain was updated with verb forms. The highest level of this hierarchy is 'Creating', surpassing 'Evaluating' which was previously the peak (Evaluation) in the 1956 version.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes the primary purpose of a 'Formative Assessment' in the teaching-learning process?
options: To assign final grades and certify student achievements at the end of a term
To provide ongoing feedback to monitor student learning and improve instruction
To rank students based on their standardized performance against a national norm
To evaluate the overall administrative effectiveness of the school curriculum
questions.explanation: Formative assessment is an ongoing diagnostic and developmental tool. Its primary function is to collect continuous feedback to help teachers adapt their teaching and students improve their learning during the instructional process.

questions.question: In the standard Indian model of microteaching developed by NCERT, what is the total designated time duration for a complete microteaching cycle?
questions.explanation: The NCERT model of microteaching consists of a 36-minute cycle split into: Teach (6 min), Feedback (6 min), Re-plan (12 min), Re-teach (6 min), and Re-feedback (6 min).

questions.question: In the context of progressive methods of instruction, who developed the 'Project Method' based on John Dewey's pragmatic philosophy of education?
questions.explanation: William Heard Kilpatrick, a student and colleague of John Dewey, formalized and popularized the Project Method of teaching, emphasizing purposeful activity conducted in a social environment.

questions.question: An individual who possesses a high capacity to detect and respond appropriately to the moods, motivations, and desires of other people is demonstrating which of Howard Gardner's multiple intelligences?
questions.explanation: According to Howard Gardner's Theory of Multiple Intelligences, interpersonal intelligence is the capacity to understand and interact effectively with other people, matching and responding to their emotions and motivations.

questions.question: When a test measures what it consistently purports to measure over repeated administrations, but does not actually align with the external curriculum standards it is supposed to evaluate, the test can be described as:
options: Both highly reliable and highly valid
questions.explanation: Reliability refers to the consistency of a test's results. Validity refers to whether the test measures what it is intended to measure. A test can yield highly consistent results (reliable) while consistently measuring the wrong concept (invalid).

questions.question: Raymond Cattell's 16 Personality Factor (16PF) questionnaire is constructed based on which statistical technique used to reduce large sets of variables to a smaller number of underlying dimensions?
questions.explanation: Raymond Cattell applied the statistical method of factor analysis to condense a massive list of personality traits into 16 primary source traits, forming the structural basis of the 16PF Questionnaire.

questions.question: In Maslow's expanded eight-stage hierarchy of needs, which need represents the desire for symmetry, order, and beauty, situated directly below Self-Actualization?
questions.explanation: In Abraham Maslow's modified eight-stage hierarchy (introduced in the 1970s), Cognitive Needs (knowledge/meaning) and Aesthetic Needs (beauty, symmetry, balance) were added as cognitive growth needs below Self-Actualization.

questions.question: In the Herbartian steps of lesson planning, which of the following is the first step that aims to prepare the minds of learners for receiving new knowledge?
questions.explanation: The Herbartian five-step teaching model begins with Preparation (or Introduction), designed to link the students' prior knowledge with the new topic to prepare them for learning.

questions.question: Which type of evaluation is specifically designed to determine a student's entry-level performance and readiness to begin a course of study, helping to locate the student in the appropriate instructional starting point?
questions.explanation: Placement evaluation is conducted before instruction begins to determine a student's prerequisite skills, entry behavior, and correct educational track or starting level.

questions.question: Which teaching strategy, heavily advocated by Jerome Bruner, encourages students to actively interact with their environment to manipulate objects, perform experiments, and struggle with questions to discover principles on their own?
questions.explanation: Jerome Bruner proposed Discovery Learning, an inquiry-based constructivist approach where learners build understanding and uncover facts and principles independently through exploration and problem-solving.

questions.question: In the affective domain of Bloom's Taxonomy (as developed by Krathwohl, Bloom, and Masia), which level represents the highest level of internalization where an individual acts consistently in accordance with their internalized values?
options: Characterization by a Value or Value Complex
questions.explanation: The affective domain taxonomy consists of five levels: Receiving, Responding, Valuing, Organization, and Characterization by a value or value complex. Characterization is the highest level, representing a fully integrated and consistent lifestyle and philosophy based on those values.

questions.question: In John Keats's "Ode on a Grecian Urn", which of the following scenes is NOT depicted on the urn?
options: A piper playing songs under trees that never lose their leaves
A bold lover perpetually on the verge of kissing his beloved
A priest leading a heifer decorated with garlands to a green altar
A solitary reaper singing a melancholy strain in a field
questions.explanation: The scene of a solitary reaper singing a melancholy strain is from William Wordsworth's poem 'The Solitary Reaper', not John Keats's 'Ode on a Grecian Urn'.

or.question: ଜନ୍ କିଟ୍ସଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ କବିତା "ଓଡ୍ ଅନ୍ ଏ ଗ୍ରେସିଆନ୍ ଅର୍ଣ୍ଣ" (Ode on a Grecian Urn) ରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ଦୃଶ୍ୟଟି ପାତ୍ର (urn) ଉପରେ ଚିତ୍ରିତ ହୋଇନାହିଁ?
options: ଗଛ ତଳେ ସଙ୍ଗୀତ ବଜାଉଥିବା ଜଣେ ବଂଶୀବାଦକ, ଯାହାର ପତ୍ର କେବେ ଝଡ଼େ ନାହିଁ
ଜଣେ ସାହସୀ ପ୍ରେମୀ ଯିଏ ନିଜ ପ୍ରେମିକାକୁ ଚୁମ୍ବନ ଦେବାକୁ ସର୍ବଦା ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ
ଜଣେ ପୂଜାରୀ ଯିଏ ଫୁଲମାଳରେ ସଜ୍ଜିତ ଏକ ଗାଈ ବାଛୁରୀକୁ ସବୁଜ ବେଦୀ ଆଡ଼କୁ ନେଇଯାଉଛନ୍ତି
ବିଲରେ ଏକାକୀ ଦୁଃଖଭରା ଗୀତ ଗାଉଥିବା ଜଣେ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରର କୃଷକ ରମଣୀ
or.explanation: ଏକାକୀ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ରମଣୀର (solitary reaper) ଦୁଃଖଭରା ଗୀତ ଗାଇବାର ଦୃଶ୍ୟଟି ୱିଲିୟମ୍ ୱର୍ଡ଼ସୱର୍ଥଙ୍କ କବିତା 'ଦି ସଲିଟାରୀ ରୀପର୍' ରୁ ଆସିଛି, ଜନ୍ କିଟ୍ସଙ୍କ 'ଓଡ୍ ଅନ୍ ଏ ଗ୍ରେସିଆନ୍ ଅର୍ଣ୍ଣ' ରୁ ନୁହେଁ।

questions.question: According to T. S. Eliot in his essay "The Metaphysical Poets" (1921), the "dissociation of sensibility" set in due to the influence of which two major seventeenth-century poets?
questions.explanation: In 'The Metaphysical Poets', T. S. Eliot explicitly states that the dissociation of sensibility, from which we have never recovered, was due to the influence of the two most powerful poets of the seventeenth century: John Milton and John Dryden.

or.question: ଟି. ଏସ୍. ଏଲିଅଟ୍‌ଙ୍କ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ "ଦି ମେଟାଫିଜିକାଲ୍ ପୋଏଟ୍ସ" (The Metaphysical Poets - 1921) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, କେଉଁ ଦୁଇଜଣ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ସପ୍ତଦଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର କବିଙ୍କ ପ୍ରଭାବ ହେତୁ "ସଂବେଦନଶୀଳତାର ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନତା" (dissociation of sensibility) ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଟି. ଏସ୍. ଏଲିଅଟ୍‌ ତାଙ୍କ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧରେ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଭାବରେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ସପ୍ତଦଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ଦୁଇ ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ କବି ଜନ୍ ମିଲଟନ୍ ଏବଂ ଜନ୍ ଡ୍ରାଇଡେନ୍‌ଙ୍କ ପ୍ରଭାବ ଯୋଗୁଁ ସଂବେଦନଶୀଳତାର ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନତା (dissociation of sensibility) ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: According to Bruce Joyce and Marsha Weil's classification of Models of Teaching, the 'Synectics' model developed by William J.J. Gordon belongs to which of the following families?
questions.explanation: The Synectics model, designed by William J.J. Gordon to stimulate creative problem-solving and personal creativity, is classified under the 'Personal Family' of teaching models in Joyce and Weil's taxonomy, which focuses on the individual and their development of unique capabilities.

or.question: ବ୍ରୁସ୍ ଜଏସ୍ (Bruce Joyce) ଏବଂ ମାର୍ଶା ୱେଲ୍ (Marsha Weil) ଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ମଡେଲ୍‌ଗୁଡ଼ିକର ବର୍ଗୀକରଣ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ୱିଲିୟମ୍ ଜେ.ଜେ. ଗର୍ଡନ୍ (William J.J. Gordon) ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବିକଶିତ 'ସାଇନେକ୍ଟିକ୍ସ' (Synectics) ମଡେଲ୍ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ପରିବାର (family) ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ?
options: ସାମାଜିକ ପାରସ୍ପରିକ କ୍ରିୟା ପରିବାର (Social Interaction Family)
or.explanation: ୱିଲିୟମ୍ ଜେ.ଜେ. ଗର୍ଡନ୍‌ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଜନଶୀଳ ସମସ୍ୟା ସମାଧାନ ଏବଂ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସୃଜନଶୀଳତାକୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ବିକଶିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ସାଇନେକ୍ଟିକ୍ସ ମଡେଲ୍‌ଟି ଜଏସ୍ ଏବଂ ୱେଲ୍‌ଙ୍କ ଶ୍ରେଣୀବିଭାଗରେ 'ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ପରିବାର' (Personal Family) ଅଧୀନରେ ଆସିଥାଏ, ଯାହା ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିର ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସାମର୍ଥ୍ୟର ବିକାଶ ଉପରେ ଧ୍ୟାନ ଦେଇଥାଏ।

questions.question: According to Sri Aurobindo’s philosophy of Integral Education, the instrument of the mind (Antahkarana) consists of four layers. Which of these layers is responsible for the active processing of sensory images into thought-forms and is known as the mind proper?
questions.explanation: In Sri Aurobindo's system of Integral Education, the Antahkarana (mind) has four layers: Chitta (the passive memory/storehouse), Manas (the sensory mind or 'mind proper' which translates sensory inputs into thought-forms), Buddhi (intellect/reasoning), and Intuition (direct vision of truth).

or.question: ଶ୍ରୀ ଅରବିନ୍ଦଙ୍କ ସମନ୍ୱିତ ଶିକ୍ଷା (Integral Education) ଦର୍ଶନ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଅନ୍ତଃକରଣ (ମନର ଯନ୍ତ୍ର) ଚାରୋଟି ସ୍ତରକୁ ନେଇ ଗଠିତ। ଏହି ସ୍ତରଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ଇନ୍ଦ୍ରିୟଗତ ଚିତ୍ରଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ବିଚାର-ରୂପରେ ସକ୍ରିୟ ଭାବରେ ରୂପାନ୍ତରିତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଦାୟୀ ଏବଂ ଏହାକୁ ପ୍ରକୃତ ମନ (mind proper) ବୋଲି କୁହାଯାଏ?
or.explanation: ଶ୍ରୀ ଅରବିନ୍ଦଙ୍କ ସମନ୍ୱିତ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରଣାଳୀରେ, ଅନ୍ତଃକରଣର ଚାରୋଟି ସ୍ତର ରହିଛି: ଚିତ୍ତ (ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମୃତି/ଭଣ୍ଡାର), ମନସ (ଇନ୍ଦ୍ରିୟଗତ ମନ ବା 'ପ୍ରକୃତ ମନ' ଯାହା ଇନ୍ଦ୍ରିୟଗତ ଅନୁଭୂତିକୁ ବିଚାରରେ ରୂପାନ୍ତରିତ କରେ), ବୁଦ୍ଧି (ବିଚାରଶକ୍ତି) ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜ୍ଞାନ (ସତ୍ୟର ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦର୍ଶନ)।

questions.question: In the General Prologue of Geoffrey Chaucer's *The Canterbury Tales*, which of the pilgrims is described as having "a fire-red cherubin's face" due to a severe skin condition?
questions.explanation: In Chaucer's *The Canterbury Tales*, the Summoner is described in the General Prologue as having a 'fyr-reed cherubynes face' because of his inflamed, acne-ridden face (carbuncles), which terrified children.

or.question: ଜେଫ୍ରି ଚସରଙ୍କ 'ଦି କ୍ୟାଣ୍ଟରବରୀ ଟେଲ୍ସ' (The Canterbury Tales) ର ଜେନେରାଲ୍ ପ୍ରୋଲୋଗ୍‌ରେ, କେଉଁ ଯାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ଚର୍ମର ଗୁରୁତର ସମସ୍ୟା ଯୋଗୁଁ ତାଙ୍କ ମୁହଁକୁ "ଏକ ନିଆଁ ଭଳି ନାଲି ଚେରୁବିନଙ୍କ ମୁହଁ" (a fire-red cherubin's face) ବୋଲି ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରାଯାଇଛି?
or.explanation: ଚସରଙ୍କ *ଦି କ୍ୟାଣ୍ଟରବରୀ ଟେଲ୍ସ*ରେ, ସମନରଙ୍କୁ ଜେନେରାଲ୍ ପ୍ରୋଲୋଗ୍‌ରେ ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରଦାହ ଜନିତ, ବ୍ରଣଭରା ମୁହଁ ଯୋଗୁଁ 'fyr-reed cherubynes face' ବୋଲି ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରାଯାଇଛି, ଯାହା ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କୁ ଭୟଭୀତ କରୁଥିଲା।

questions.question: In W. B. Yeats's poem "Easter, 1916", who is the woman described as spending her days in "ignorant good-will" and her nights in political argument until her voice grew shrill?
questions.explanation: In "Easter, 1916", Yeats reflects on the participants of the Easter Rising. The lines 'That woman's days were spent / In ignorant good-will...' refer to Constance Markievicz (née Gore-Booth), whom he remembered as a beautiful young woman before she became politically radicalized.

or.question: ଡବ୍ଲୁ. ବି. ୟେଟ୍ସଙ୍କ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ କବିତା "ଇଷ୍ଟର, ୧୯୧୬" (Easter, 1916) ରେ, କେଉଁ ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ଦିନଗୁଡ଼ିକ "ଅଜ୍ଞ ମଙ୍ଗଳକାମନା" (ignorant good-will) ଏବଂ ରାତିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ରାଜନୈତିକ ଯୁକ୍ତିତର୍କରେ କଟିଥିଲା ବୋଲି ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରାଯାଇଛି, ଯେଉଁଥିପାଇଁ ତାଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱର କର୍କଶ ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: "ଇଷ୍ଟର, ୧୯୧୬" ରେ, ୟେଟ୍ସ ଇଷ୍ଟର ବିଦ୍ରୋହର ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣକାରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ମନେ ପକାଇଛନ୍ତି। 'That woman's days were spent / In ignorant good-will...' ଧାଡ଼ିଗୁଡ଼ିକ କନଷ୍ଟାନ୍ସ ମାର୍କିଭିକ୍ସ (ପୂର୍ବନାମ କନଷ୍ଟାନ୍ସ ଗୋର୍-ବୁଥ୍‌) ଙ୍କୁ ସୂଚିତ କରେ, ଯାହାଙ୍କୁ ସେ ରାଜନୈତିକ ଭାବେ ସକ୍ରିୟ ହେବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଜଣେ ସୁନ୍ଦରୀ ଯୁବତୀ ଭାବରେ ମନେ ରଖିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: In Flanders' Interaction Analysis Category System (FIACS), which group of categories represents 'Indirect Teacher Influence'?
options: Lecturing, Giving directions, Criticizing or justifying authority
Accepting feeling, Praising or encouraging, Accepting or using ideas of pupils, Asking questions
Student talk-response, Student talk-initiation, Silence or confusion
Lecturing, Asking questions, Giving directions, Student talk-initiation
questions.explanation: In Flanders' Interaction Analysis Category System (FIACS), the 10 categories are divided into Teacher Talk, Pupil Talk, and Silence/Confusion. Teacher Talk is further divided into Indirect Influence (Categories 1-4: Accepting feeling, Praising or encouraging, Accepting or using ideas of pupils, and Asking questions) and Direct Influence (Categories 5-7: Lecturing, Giving directions, and Criticizing or justifying authority).

or.question: ଫ୍ଲାଣ୍ଡର୍ସଙ୍କ ପାରସ୍ପରିକ କ୍ରିୟା ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ ବର୍ଗୀକରଣ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ (FIACS) ରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ବର୍ଗ ସମୂହ 'ପରୋକ୍ଷ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ପ୍ରଭାବ' (Indirect Teacher Influence) କୁ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ୱ କରେ?
options: ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟାନ ଦେବା, ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେବା, କର୍ତ୍ତୃତ୍ୱକୁ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିବା ବა ଯଥାର୍ଥତା ପ୍ରତିପାଦନ କରିବା
ଅնୁଭୂତିକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା, ପ୍ରଶଂସା ବା ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବା, ଛାତ୍ରମାନଙ୍କ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା ବା ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବା, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରିବା
ଛାତ୍ର କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା-ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା, ଛାତ୍ର କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା-ଆରମ୍ଭ, ନୀରବତା ବା ବିଭ୍ରାନ୍ତି
ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟାନ ଦେବା, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରିବା, ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେବା, ଛାତ୍ର କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା-ଆରମ୍ଭ
or.explanation: ଫ୍ଲାଣ୍ଡର୍ସଙ୍କ ପାରସ୍ପରିକ କ୍ରିୟା ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ ବର୍ଗୀକରଣ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ (FIACS) ରେ, ୧୦ଟି ବର୍ଗକୁ ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା, ଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା ଏବଂ ନୀରବତା/ବିଭ୍ରାନ୍ତିରେ ବିଭକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଶିକ୍ଷକଙ୍କ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତାକୁ ପୁନଶ୍ଚ ପରୋକ୍ଷ ପ୍ରଭାବ (ବର୍ଗ ୧-୪: ଅնୁଭୂତି ଗ୍ରହଣ, ପ୍ରଶଂସା ବା ଉତ୍ସାହ ପ୍ରଦାନ, ଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା ଗ୍ରହଣ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରିବା) ଏବଂ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପ୍ରଭାବ (ବର୍ଗ ୫-୭: ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟାନ, ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଏବଂ ସମାଲୋଚନା ବା କର୍ତ୍ତୃତ୍ୱ ପ୍ରତିପାଦନ) ରେ ବିଭକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି।

questions.question: According to Robert Gagné’s Hierarchy of Learning, which of the following represents the correct sequential order of the first four lower-level types of learning (from lowest to highest)?
options: Signal learning -> Stimulus-Response learning -> Chaining -> Verbal association
Stimulus-Response learning -> Signal learning -> Chaining -> Verbal association
Signal learning -> Chaining -> Stimulus-Response learning -> Verbal association
Signal learning -> Stimulus-Response learning -> Verbal association -> Chaining
questions.explanation: Robert Gagné proposed eight levels of learning in his hierarchy. The first four lower-level types of learning in ascending order are: 1. Signal learning, 2. Stimulus-Response learning, 3. Chaining, and 4. Verbal association.

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ଗାଗ୍ନେଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ କ୍ରମଶ୍ରେଣୀ (Hierarchy of Learning) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ପ୍ରଥମ ଚାରୋଟି ନିମ୍ନ-ସ୍ତରୀୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ପ୍ରକାରର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମିକ ସଜ୍ଜାକୁ (ନିମ୍ନରୁ ଉଚ୍ଚ ସ୍ତରକୁ) ଦର୍ଶାଏ?
options: ସଙ୍କେତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ-ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳୀକରଣ -> ଶାବ୍ଦିକ ସହଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ
ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ-ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ସଙ୍କେତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳୀକରଣ -> ଶାବ୍ଦିକ ସହଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ
ସଙ୍କେତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳୀକରଣ -> ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ-ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଶାବ୍ଦିକ ସହଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ
ସଙ୍କେତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ-ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଶାବ୍ଦିକ ସହଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ -> ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳୀକରଣ
or.explanation: ରବର୍ଟ ଗାଗ୍ନେ ଶିକ୍ଷଣର ଆଠଟି ସ୍ତର ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ କରିଥିଲେ। ଆରୋହଣ କ୍ରମରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ଚାରୋଟି ନିମ୍ନ-ସ୍ତରୀୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ହେଉଛି: ୧. ସଙ୍କେତ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ (Signal learning), ୨. ଉଦ୍ଦୀପକ-ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଶିକ୍ଷଣ (Stimulus-Response learning), ୩. ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳୀକରଣ (Chaining) ଏବଂ ୪. ଶାବ୍ଦିକ ସହଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ (Verbal association)।

questions.question: During Mahatma Gandhi's first visit to Odisha in 1921, at which of the following places in Cuttack did he address a historic mass gathering on 23rd March 1921?
questions.explanation: On 23rd March 1921, during his first visit to Odisha to propagate the Non-Cooperation Movement, Mahatma Gandhi addressed a historic, massive public meeting at the Kathajodi River Bed in Cuttack.

or.question: ୧୯୨୧ ମସିହାରେ ମହାତ୍ମା ଗାନ୍ଧୀଙ୍କ ପ୍ରଥମ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗସ୍ତ ସମୟରେ, ୨୩ ମାର୍ଚ୍ଚ ୧୯୨୧ ରେ ସେ କଟକର କେଉଁ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଏକ ଐତିହାସିକ ଜନସଭାକୁ ସମ୍ବୋଧିତ କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ଅସହଯୋଗ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନର ପ୍ରଚାର ପାଇଁ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗସ୍ତ ସମୟରେ, ୨୩ ମାର୍ଚ୍ଚ ୧୯୨୧ ରେ ମହାତ୍ମା ଗାନ୍ଧୀ କଟକର କାଠଯୋଡ଼ି ନଦୀ ଶଯ୍ୟାରେ ଏକ ବିଶାଳ ଐତିହାସିକ ଜନସଭାକୁ ସମ୍ବୋଧିତ କରିଥିଲେ।

questions.question: The famous Chausath Yogini Temple at Hirapur near Bhubaneswar is believed to have been constructed during the reign of which Bhauma-Kara queen?
questions.explanation: The Chausath Yogini Temple located at Hirapur (near Bhubaneswar) is widely believed by historians to have been built during the 9th century AD under the patronage of Queen Hiradevi of the Bhauma-Kara dynasty.

or.question: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ହୀରାପୁରରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଚୌଷଠି ଯୋଗିନୀ ମନ୍ଦିର କେଉଁ ଭୌମକର ରାଣୀଙ୍କ ଶାସନ କାଳରେ ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା ବୋଲି ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରାଯାଏ?
or.explanation: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର ନିକଟ ହୀରାପୁରର ଚୌଷଠି ଯୋଗିନୀ ମନ୍ଦିର ୯ମ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀରେ ଭୌମକର ବଂଶର ରାଣୀ ହୀରାଦେବୀଙ୍କ ପୃଷ୍ଠପୋଷକତାରେ ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା ବୋଲି ଐତିହାସିକମାନେ ମତ ଦିଅନ୍ତି।

questions.question: The famous hypaethral Chausath Yogini temple at Hirapur near Bhubaneswar was built during the reign of which queen of the Bhauma-Kara dynasty?
questions.explanation: The Chausath Yogini temple at Hirapur, known for its unique circular hypaethral (roofless) architecture, is historically attributed to Queen Hiradevi (or Hira Mahadevi), the queen of Bhauma-Kara ruler Shantikaradeva II, during the 9th century AD.

or.question: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ହୀରାପୁରଠାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଚୌଷଠୀ ଯୋଗିନୀ ମନ୍ଦିର ଭୌମ-କର ବଂଶର କେଉଁ ରାଣୀଙ୍କ ଶାସନ କାଳରେ ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ହୀରାପୁରର ଚୌଷଠୀ ଯୋଗିନୀ ମନ୍ଦିର ଏହାର ଅନନ୍ୟ ଗୋଲାକାର ଛାତବିହୀନ ସ୍ଥାପତ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ଜଣାଶୁଣା। ଏହା ନବମ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀରେ ଭୌମ-କର ଶାସକ ଶାନ୍ତିକରଦେବ II ଙ୍କ ରାଣୀ ହୀରାଦେବୀ (ବା ହୀରା ମହାଦେବୀ) ଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା ବୋଲି ଐତିହାସିକ ଭାବେ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।

questions.question: In which year was the Cuttack Mission Press, the first printing press of Odisha, established by the Christian Missionaries?
questions.explanation: The Cuttack Mission Press, which played a pioneering role in the growth of Odia literature and journalism, was established in 1837 by the Baptist Missionary Society.

or.question: ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟିଆନ ମିଶନାରୀମାନଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ପ୍ରଥମ ମୁଦ୍ରଣାଳୟ 'କଟକ ମିଶନ ପ୍ରେସ' କେଉଁ ବର୍ଷ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଆ ସାହିତ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକତାର ବିକାଶରେ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ଭୂମିକା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିବା କଟକ ମିଶନ ପ୍ରେସ, ୧୮୩୭ ମସିହାରେ ବାପ୍ଟିଷ୍ଟ ମିଶନାରୀ ସୋସਾਈଟି ଦ୍ୱାରା ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: In Cleanth Brooks's landmark work of New Criticism, 'The Well Wrought Urn' (1947), which poem is extensively analyzed in the opening chapter titled 'The Language of Paradox'?
options: John Keats's 'Ode on a Grecian Urn'
Thomas Gray's 'Elegy Written in a Country Churchyard'
questions.explanation: The first chapter of Cleanth Brooks's 'The Well Wrought Urn' is titled 'The Language of Paradox', where he performs a close reading of John Donne's poem 'The Canonization' to demonstrate that paradox is the central language of poetry.

or.question: କ୍ଲିନ୍ଥ ବ୍ରୁକ୍ସଙ୍କ ନ୍ୟୁ କ୍ରିଟିସିଜମ୍‌ର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ଗ୍ରନ୍ଥ 'ଦି ୱେଲ୍ ରଟ୍ ଅର୍ନ୍' (୧୯୪୭) ର ପ୍ରଥମ ଅଧ୍ୟାୟ "ଦି ଲାଙ୍ଗୁଏଜ୍ ଅଫ୍ ପାରାଡକ୍ସ" ରେ କେଉଁ କବିତାଟିର ବିସ୍ତୃତ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ କରାଯାଇଛି?
options: ଜନ୍ କିଟ୍ସ‌ଙ୍କ "ଓଡ୍ ଅନ୍ ଏ ଗ୍ରେସିଆନ୍ ଅର୍ନ୍"
ଥୋମାସ୍ ଗ୍ରେ‌ଙ୍କ "ଏଲିଜି ରିଟନ୍ ଇନ୍ ଏ କଣ୍ଟ୍ରି ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚୟାର୍ଡ"
or.explanation: କ୍ଲିନ୍ଥ ବ୍ରୁକ୍ସଙ୍କ 'ଦି ୱେଲ୍ ରଟ୍ ଅର୍ନ୍' ର ପ୍ରଥମ ଅଧ୍ୟାୟ "ଦି ଲାଙ୍ଗୁଏଜ୍ ଅଫ୍ ପାରାଡକ୍ସ" ଜନ୍ ଡନ୍‌ଙ୍କ କବିତା "ଦି କ୍ୟାନୋନାଇଜେସନ୍" ର ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଛି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ସେ ଦର୍ଶାଇଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ବିରୋଧାଭାସ (paradox) ହେଉଛି କାବ୍ୟିକ ଭାଷାର ଏକ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅଙ୍ଗ।

questions.question: Sri Aurobindo's monumental epic poem 'Savitri', based on the Mahabharata narrative of Savitri and Satyavan, carries which subtitle?
questions.explanation: Sri Aurobindo's epic poem is explicitly subtitled 'A Legend and a Symbol' (Savitri: A Legend and a Symbol), representing both a narrative story from the Mahabharata and an allegorical representation of spiritual evolution.

or.question: ମହାଭାରତର ସାବିତ୍ରୀ ଓ ସତ୍ୟବାନ୍ କାହାଣୀ ଉପରେ ଆଧାରିତ ଶ୍ରୀ ଅରବିନ୍ଦଙ୍କ ମହାକାବ୍ୟ 'ସାବିତ୍ରୀ' ର ଉପଶୀର୍ଷକ (subtitle) କ’ଣ?
options: ଏ ଟେଲ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଟ୍ରାନ୍ସେଣ୍ଡେନ୍ସ (A Tale of Transcendence)
ଏ ଲେଜେଣ୍ଡ୍ ଏଣ୍ଡ୍ ଏ ସିମ୍ବଲ୍ (A Legend and a Symbol)
ଏନ୍ ଏପିକ୍ ଅଫ୍ ହ୍ୟୁମାନ୍ ଡେଷ୍ଟିନି (An Epic of Human Destiny)
ଏ ମାଇଥ୍ ଅଫ୍ କସମିକ୍ ଏଭୋଲ୍ୟୁସନ୍ (A Myth of Cosmic Evolution)
or.explanation: ଶ୍ରୀ ଅରବିନ୍ଦଙ୍କ ମହାକାବ୍ୟ 'ସାବିତ୍ରୀ' ର ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଶୀର୍ଷକ ହେଉଛି 'Savitri: A Legend and a Symbol'। ଏହା ମହାଭାରତର ଏକ ପୌରାଣିକ ଆଖ୍ୟାୟିକା ସହ ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ଚେତନାର ପ୍ରତୀକାତ୍ମକ ରୂପକୁ ପ୍ରତିଫଳିତ କରେ।

questions.question: According to Edgar Dale's Cone of Experience, which of the following instructional experiences provides the highest level of directness and concrete learning to students?
questions.explanation: At the base of Edgar Dale's Cone of Experience are 'Direct Purposeful Experiences', which involve first-hand, concrete learning experiences with real life objects/situations, making them the most direct form of learning.

or.question: ଏଡଗାର ଡେଲ (Edgar Dale)ଙ୍କ 'Cone of Experience' (ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତାର କୋନ୍) ଅନୁସାରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁ ଶିକ୍ଷଣୀୟ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଅଧିକ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଏବଂ ମୂର୍ତ୍ତ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଥାଏ?
or.explanation: ଏଡଗାର ଡେଲଙ୍କ Cone of Experience ର ସବୁଠାରୁ ତଳ ଭାଗରେ 'Direct Purposeful Experiences' (ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟମୂଳକ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା) ରହିଛି, ଯାହା ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଏବଂ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଅଧିକ ମୂର୍ତ୍ତ (concrete) ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରେ।

questions.question: In Robert Glaser's Basic Teaching Model (1962), the instructional process is divided into four main components. Which of the following represents the correct sequential order of these components?
options: Entering Behavior -> Instructional Objectives -> Instructional Procedures -> Performance Assessment
Instructional Objectives -> Entering Behavior -> Instructional Procedures -> Performance Assessment
Instructional Objectives -> Instructional Procedures -> Entering Behavior -> Performance Assessment
Entering Behavior -> Instructional Objectives -> Performance Assessment -> Instructional Procedures
questions.explanation: Robert Glaser's Basic Teaching Model outlines four sequential stages: (1) Instructional Objectives, (2) Entering Behavior, (3) Instructional Procedures, and (4) Performance Assessment.

or.question: ରବର୍ଟ ଗ୍ଲେସର (Robert Glaser)ଙ୍କ ମୌଳିକ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ମଡେଲ (Basic Teaching Model, 1962) ରେ, ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାକୁ ଚାରୋଟି ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅଙ୍ଗରେ ବିଭକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ଏହି ସୋପାନଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ?
options: ପ୍ରବେଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର -> ଶିକ୍ଷଣୀୟ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ -> ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ -> ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ
ଶିକ୍ଷଣୀୟ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ -> ପ୍ରବେଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର -> ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ -> ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ
ଶିକ୍ଷଣୀୟ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ -> ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ -> ପ୍ରବେଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର -> ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ
ପ୍ରବେଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର -> ଶିକ୍ଷଣୀୟ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ -> ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ -> ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ
or.explanation: ରବର୍ଟ ଗ୍ଲେସରଙ୍କ ମୌଳିକ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ ମଡେଲରେ ଚାରୋଟି କ୍ରମାନୁସାରୀ ସୋପାନ ରହିଛି: ୧. ଶିକ୍ଷଣୀୟ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ (Instructional Objectives), ୨. ପ୍ରବେଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର (Entering Behavior), ୩. ଶିକ୍ଷାଦାନ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ (Instructional Procedures), ଏବଂ ୪. ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ (Performance Assessment)।

questions.question: Which wetland in Odisha was designated as the first Ramsar Site in India, along with Keoladeo National Park, in October 1981?
questions.explanation: Chilika Lake was designated as the first Ramsar site (Wetland of International Importance) in India in October 1981, alongside Keoladeo National Park in Rajasthan.

or.question: ୧୯୮୧ ମସିହା ଅକ୍ଟୋବରରେ କେଓଲାଦେଓ ଜାତୀୟ ଉଦ୍ୟାନ ସହିତ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କେଉଁ ଆର୍ଦ୍ରଭୂମିକୁ ଭାରତର ପ୍ରଥମ ରାମସର ସାଇଟ୍ (Ramsar Site) ଭାବରେ ମାନ୍ୟତା ଦିଆଯାଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ୧୯୮୧ ମସିହାରେ ଚିଲିକା ହ୍ରଦ ଏବଂ ରାଜସ୍ଥାନର କେଓଲାଦେଓ ଜାତୀୟ ଉଦ୍ୟାନକୁ ଭାରତର ପ୍ରଥମ ରାମସର ସାଇଟ୍ (ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଆର୍ଦ୍ରଭୂମି) ଭାବରେ ଘୋଷଣା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: On 5th January 1939, Major R. L. Bazalgette, the Political Agent of Orissa Feudatory States, was assassinated during the Prajamandal Movement in which princely state?
questions.explanation: Major R. L. Bazalgette, the British Political Agent of Orissa Feudatory States, was killed by an agitated crowd in the princely state of Ranpur on 5th January 1939 during the Prajamandal Movement.

or.question: ୧୯୩୯ ମସିହା ଜାନୁଆରୀ ୫ ତାରିଖରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ରାଜ୍ୟର ପଲିଟିକାଲ ଏଜେଣ୍ଟ ମେଜର ଆର. ଏଲ. ବାଜେଲଗେଟ୍ ପ୍ରଜାମଣ୍ଡଳ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସମୟରେ କେଉଁ ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ନିହତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: ୧୯୩୯ ଜାନୁଆରୀ ୫ ରେ ରଣପୁର ଗଡ଼ଜାତ ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ପ୍ରଜାମଣ୍ଡଳ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସମୟରେ ଉତ୍ତ୍ୟକ୍ତ ଜନତାଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ବ୍ରିଟିଶ ପଲିଟିକାଲ ଏଜେଣ୍ଟ ମେଜର ଆର. ଏଲ. ବାଜେଲଗେଟ୍ ନିହତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ।

questions.question: Which wildlife sanctuary in Odisha is globally renowned as the world's largest mass nesting site (Arribada) for the endangered Olive Ridley sea turtles?
questions.explanation: Gahirmatha Marine Sanctuary, located in the Kendrapara district of Odisha, is world-famous as the largest mass nesting beach (Arribada) for Olive Ridley sea turtles.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କେଉଁ ବନ୍ୟପ୍ରାଣୀ ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ ବିପନ୍ନ ଅଲିଭ୍ ରିଡ୍‌ଲେ ସମୁଦ୍ର କାଛଡ଼ାମାନଙ୍କର ବିଶ୍ୱର ସବୁଠାରୁ ବଡ଼ ଗଣ-ପ୍ରଜନନ ସ୍ଥଳ (ଅରିବାଡ଼ା) ଭାବରେ ବିଶ୍ୱପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରାପଡ଼ା ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ଗହିରମଥା ସାମୁଦ୍ରିକ ଅଭୟାରଣ୍ୟ ଅଲିଭ୍ ରିଡ୍‌ଲେ ସମୁଦ୍ର କାଛଡ଼ାମାନଙ୍କର ବିଶ୍ୱର ସବୁଠାରୁ ବଡ଼ ଗଣ-ପ୍ରଜନନ ସ୍ଥଳ (ଅରିବାଡ଼ା) ଭାବରେ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ।

questions.question: The famous Sanskrit drama 'Parasurama Vijaya', which features some of the earliest recorded Odia verses, was composed by which Gajapati ruler of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Gajapati Kapilendra Deva, the founder of the Suryavamsi Gajapati dynasty of Odisha, authored the Sanskrit play 'Parasurama Vijaya', which contains early usage of the Odia language.

or.question: ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ପଦ୍ୟର ପ୍ରୟୋଗ ଥିବା ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ସଂସ୍କୃତ ନାଟକ 'ପରଶୁରାମ ବିଜୟ' ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କେଉଁ ଗଜପତି ଶାସକଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ରଚିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀ ଗଜପତି ସାମ୍ରାଜ୍ୟର ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାତା ଗଜପତି କପିଳେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଦେବ 'ପରଶୁରାମ ବିଜୟ' ନାମକ ସଂସ୍କୃତ ନାଟକ ରଚନା କରିଥିଲେ, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଭାଷାର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ପ୍ରୟୋଗ ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳେ।

questions.question: According to Jean Piaget's theory of cognitive development, at which stage do children typically acquire the concept of conservation (understanding that quantity remains constant despite changes in shape or appearance)?
questions.explanation: During the concrete operational stage (roughly ages 7 to 11), children develop the cognitive ability of conservation, realizing that properties such as mass, volume, and number remain the same despite changes in the forms of objects.

questions.question: In Lev Vygotsky's sociocultural theory, the temporary instructional support provided by a teacher or a more competent peer to help a learner master a task is called:
questions.explanation: Scaffolding, a term closely associated with Vygotsky's Zone of Proximal Development (coined by Jerome Bruner in explaining Vygotsky's work), refers to the temporary support given to a learner during the learning process.

questions.question: According to Lawrence Kohlberg's stage theory of moral development, an individual whose moral reasoning is primarily guided by avoiding physical punishment and obeying authority figures unconditionally is functioning at the:
questions.explanation: At the pre-conventional level (specifically Stage 1: Punishment and Obedience Orientation), moral decisions are based entirely on direct physical consequences and fear of punishment.

questions.question: In Ivan Pavlov's classical conditioning experiments with dogs, which element served as the Unconditioned Stimulus (UCS)?
options: Salivation in response to the bell
questions.explanation: In Pavlov's classic paradigm, food naturally and automatically triggers salivation without prior training, making it the Unconditioned Stimulus (UCS).

questions.question: A classroom teacher awards a star sticker to students after every five completed homework assignments. Which schedule of operant reinforcement is being utilized?
questions.explanation: A fixed-ratio schedule delivers reinforcement only after a predetermined, fixed number of correct responses—in this case, every 5th completed assignment.

questions.question: In the Atkinson-Shiffrin Multi-Store Model of Memory, what are the storage capacity and retention duration characteristic of iconic (visual sensory) memory?
options: Unlimited capacity, duration up to 30 seconds
Large capacity, duration less than 1 second
Small capacity, duration up to 2 minutes
questions.explanation: Iconic memory holds a very large amount of visual sensory information, but it decays extremely rapidly, retaining visual images for less than 0.5 to 1 second.

questions.question: Which core premise distinguishes Ernst von Glasersfeld's 'Radical Constructivism' from traditional epistemologies?
options: Knowledge is passively received from the environment through sensory organs.
Knowledge represents an exact objective reflection of external reality.
Knowledge is actively constructed by the learner to organize experiential reality, rather than discover objective truth.
Knowledge is exclusively built through classical conditioning and direct social reinforcement.
questions.explanation: Radical Constructivism, formulated by Ernst von Glasersfeld, posits that knowledge is an adaptive organization of the experiential world, rather than a discovery of an objective, ontological reality.

questions.question: Which pioneer of educational psychology formulated the 'Law of Effect', stating that behaviors followed by satisfying outcomes are more likely to recur?
questions.explanation: Edward Lee Thorndike formulated the Law of Effect based on his puzzle-box experiments with cats, laying the groundwork for B.F. Skinner's operant conditioning.

questions.question: The 'cephalocaudal' principle of motor development indicates that physical control and growth in an infant progress in which spatial pattern?
options: From the center of the body outward to the extremities
From the head downward toward the feet
From the feet upward toward the head
From complex fine motor control to simple gross motor control
questions.explanation: The cephalocaudal pattern dictates that motor development proceeds from top to bottom (head to toe); an infant gains control of neck and head movements before torso and legs.

questions.question: In Jean Piaget's theory, when a child encounters new environmental information that contradicts their current cognitive schema and must modify that schema to regain equilibrium, this process is specifically called:
questions.explanation: Accommodation occurs when existing cognitive structures (schemas) are modified or new ones are created to incorporate novel information that does not fit into existing schemas.

questions.question: According to Lev Vygotsky, the transitional phase of speech that bridges social (external) speech and inner speech during early childhood (typically around ages 3 to 7) is known as:
questions.explanation: Vygotsky viewed egocentric or private speech as a crucial developmental bridge between external communication and internal self-regulation (inner speech), typically prominent between ages 3 and 7.

questions.question: In Lawrence Kohlberg's framework, Stage 5 moral reasoning (Social Contract and Individual Rights) belongs to which broader level of morality?
questions.explanation: Stage 5 (Social Contract and Individual Rights) and Stage 6 (Universal Ethical Principles) together constitute the Post-conventional (or Principled) Level of moral development.

questions.question: In J. P. Guilford's Structure of Intellect (SOI) model, which of the following mental processes is categorized under the dimension of 'Operations'?
questions.explanation: Guilford's SOI model classifies intellect into Operations, Contents, and Products. Operations include Cognition, Memory Recording, Memory Retention, Divergent Production (Divergent Thinking), Convergent Production, and Evaluation.

questions.question: In Alan Baddeley's multi-component model of working memory, which subcomponent is responsible for temporary storage and manipulation of speech-based verbal and auditory material?
questions.explanation: The Phonological Loop consists of a phonological store (speech perception) and an articulatory rehearsal process (speech production), specialized for processing auditory and verbal information.

questions.question: According to Erik Erikson's theory of psychosocial development, what primary developmental crisis occurs during adolescence (Stage 5)?
questions.explanation: During adolescence (approx. ages 12–18), individuals experience Stage 5 of Erikson's model: Identity vs. Role Confusion, where they explore values, beliefs, and goals to build a coherent sense of self.

questions.question: In Samuel Taylor Coleridge's poem 'The Rime of the Ancient Mariner', which bird is slain by the Mariner with a crossbow?
questions.explanation: In Coleridge's 'The Rime of the Ancient Mariner', the Mariner impulsively shoots the Albatross with a crossbow, which brings a terrible curse upon his ship and fellow sailors.

or.question: ସାମୁଏଲ ଟେଲର କୋଲରିଜ୍‌ଙ୍କ କବିତା 'ଦି ରାଇମ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଦି ଆନ୍ସିଏଣ୍ଟ ମାରିନର୍' (The Rime of the Ancient Mariner) ରେ, ନାବିକ (Mariner) କେଉଁ ପକ୍ଷୀଟିକୁ ଧନୁ-ଶର (crossbow) ଦ୍ୱାରା ହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିଲେ?
or.explanation: କୋଲରିଜ୍‌ଙ୍କ 'ଦି ରାଇମ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଦି ଆନ୍ସିଏଣ୍ଟ ମାରିନର୍' ରେ, ନାବିକଜଣକ ଏକ ଆଲବାଟ୍ରୋସ୍ ପକ୍ଷୀକୁ ଧନୁ-ଶର ଦ୍ୱାରା ଶିକାର କରିଥିଲେ, ଯାହା ଫଳରେ ଜାହାଜ ଏବଂ ଏହାର କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଅଭିଶାପ ଆସିଥିଲା।

questions.question: In her seminal 1979 essay 'Toward a Feminist Poetics', Elaine Showalter coined which term to refer to a critical approach that focuses specifically on women as writers and the history of female literary production?
questions.explanation: Elaine Showalter introduced the term 'Gynocriticism' (or gynocritics) to define the study of women as writers—examining female literary history, themes, genres, and structures, as opposed to analyzing female characters written by men ('feminist critique').

or.question: ଏଲେନ୍ ସୋୱାଲଟର୍ (Elaine Showalter) ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ୧୯୭୯ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ 'ଟୁୱାର୍ଡସ୍ ଏ ଫେମିନିଷ୍ଟ ପୋଏଟିକ୍ସ' (Toward a Feminist Poetics) ରେ, ବିଶେଷ ଭାବରେ ମହିଳା ଲେଖିକା ଏବଂ ନାରୀ ସାହିତ୍ୟର ଐତିହାସିକ ବିଶ୍ଳେଷଣ ଉପରେ ଧ୍ୟାନ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରୀଭୂତ କରୁଥିବା ନାରୀବାଦୀ ସମାଲୋଚନା ପାଇଁ କେଉଁ ଶବ୍ଦଟି ପ୍ରବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରିଛନ୍ତି?
or.explanation: ଏଲେନ୍ ସୋୱାଲଟର୍ 'ଟୁୱାର୍ଡସ୍ ଏ ଫେମିନିଷ୍ଟ ପୋଏଟିକ୍ସ' (୧୯୭୯) ରେ 'ଗାଇନୋକ୍ରିଟିସିଜମ୍' (Gynocriticism) ଶବ୍ଦଟିର ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଥିଲେ, ଯାହା ମହିଳାମାନଙ୍କୁ ଲେଖକ ଭାବରେ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ କରିବା (ସେମାନଙ୍କ ଇତିହାସ, ଶୈଳୀ, ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ସଂରଚନା) କୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ।

questions.question: In the standard 36-minute Microteaching Cycle developed by NCERT, what is the duration allotted for the 'Re-planning' phase?
questions.explanation: The standard NCERT Microteaching cycle lasts 36 minutes in total: Teaching (6 min), Feedback (6 min), Re-planning (12 min), Re-teaching (6 min), and Re-feedback (6 min).

or.question: NCERT ଦ୍ୱାରା ବିକଶିତ ୩୬-ମିନିଟ୍ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ମାଇକ୍ରୋଟିଚିଂ (ସୂକ୍ଷ୍ମ ଶିକ୍ଷଣ) ଚକ୍ରରେ 'ପୁନଃ-ଯୋଜନା' (Re-planning) ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟ ପାଇଁ କେତେ ସମୟ ଆବଣ୍ଟିତ ହୋଇଥାଏ?
or.explanation: NCERT ମାଇକ୍ରୋଟିଚିଂ ଚକ୍ରର ମୋଟ ଅବଧି ୩୬ ମିନିଟ୍: ଶିକ୍ଷଣ (୬ ମିନିଟ୍), ପ୍ରତିପୁଷ୍ଟି (୬ ମିନିଟ୍), ପୁନଃ-ଯୋଜନା (୧୨ ମିନିଟ୍), ପୁନଃ-ଶିକ୍ଷଣ (୬ ମିନିଟ୍), ଏବଂ ପୁନଃ-ପ୍ରତିପୁଷ୍ଟି (୬ ମିନିଟ୍)।

questions.question: In David Krathwohl's affective domain taxonomy of educational objectives, which of the following represents the correct hierarchical order from the lowest to the highest level of internalization?
questions.explanation: Krathwohl's taxonomy of the affective domain arranges objectives in five hierarchical levels based on degree of internalization: Receiving (lowest), Responding, Valuing, Organization, and Characterization by a value complex (highest).

or.question: ଡେଭିଡ୍ କ୍ରାଥୱୋଲଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷାଗତ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟର ଭାବାତ୍ମକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର (Affective Domain) ବର୍ଗୀକରଣରେ, ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ କେଉଁଟି ସବୁଠାରୁ ନିମ୍ନରୁ ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ସ୍ତରର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଏ?
options: ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା (Receiving) -> ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଦେବା (Responding) -> ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ କରିବା (Valuing) -> ସଂଗଠନ (Organization) -> ଚରିତ୍ରଗତ କରିବା (Characterization)
ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଦେବା (Responding) -> ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା (Receiving) -> ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ କରିବା (Valuing) -> ଚରିତ୍ରଗତ କରିବା (Characterization) -> ସଂଗଠନ (Organization)
ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା (Receiving) -> ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ କରିବା (Valuing) -> ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଦେବା (Responding) -> ସଂଗଠନ (Organization) -> ଚରିତ୍ରଗତ କରିବା (Characterization)
ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଦେବା (Responding) -> ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା (Receiving) -> ସଂଗଠନ (Organization) -> ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ କରିବା (Valuing) -> ଚରିତ୍ରଗତ କରିବା (Characterization)
or.explanation: କ୍ରାଥୱୋଲଙ୍କ ଭାବାତ୍ମକ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରର କ୍ରମ ହେଉଛି: ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା (Receiving) -> ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଦେବା (Responding) -> ମୂଲ୍ୟାଙ୍କନ କରିବା (Valuing) -> ସଂଗଠନ (Organization) -> ଚରିତ୍ରଗତ କରିବା (Characterization)।

questions.question: The catastrophic 'Na'Anka Durbhiksha' (great famine of Odisha) occurred in which year during British rule?
questions.explanation: The Na'Anka Durbhiksha occurred in 1866 during the 9th regnal year (Na'Anka) of Gajapati Divyasingha Deva. It was a severe famine in Odisha that wiped out about one-third of the region's population.

or.question: ବ୍ରିଟିଶ୍ ଶାସନ ସମୟରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଭୟଙ୍କର 'ନ'ଅଙ୍କ ଦୁର୍ଭିକ୍ଷ' କେଉଁ ମସିହାରେ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ନ'ଅଙ୍କ ଦୁର୍ଭିକ୍ଷ ୧୮୬୬ ମସିହାରେ ଗଜପତି ଦିବ୍ୟସିଂହ ଦେବଙ୍କ ୯ମ ଅଙ୍କ (ରାଜତ୍ୱ ବର୍ଷ) ସମୟରେ ଘଟିଥିଲା । ଏହା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଏକ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ବିନାଶକାରୀ ଦୁର୍ଭିକ୍ଷ ଥିଲା, ଯାହା ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଜନସଂଖ୍ୟାର ପ୍ରାୟ ଏକ ତୃତୀୟାଂଶ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ ନେଇଥିଲା ।

questions.question: The famous epic poem 'Baidehisa Vilasa', in which every single line begins with the Odia letter 'Ba' (ବ), was authored by which celebrated Odia poet?
questions.explanation: 'Baidehisa Vilasa' is a masterwork of Odia literature composed by Kabi Samrat Upendra Bhanja. It adheres to a strict lipogrammatic rule where every line starts with the consonant 'Ba' (ବ).

or.question: ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଧାଡ଼ି 'ବ' ଅକ୍ଷରରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ କାବ୍ୟ 'ବୈଦେହୀଶ ବିଳାସ' କେଉଁ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଓଡ଼ିଆ କବିଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ରଚିତ?
or.explanation: 'ବୈଦେହୀଶ ବିଳାସ' କବିସମ୍ରାଟ ଉପେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଭଞ୍ଜଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ରଚିତ ଏକ କାବ୍ୟ । ଏହାର ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ପଦର ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଧାଡ଼ି 'ବ' ଅକ୍ଷରରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥାଏ ।

questions.question: The Ananta Vasudeva Temple in Bhubaneswar, the only major Vaishnavite temple in the city, was constructed in 1278 AD by which of the following Ganga princesses?
questions.explanation: The Ananta Vasudeva Temple was built in 1278 AD by Princess Chandrika Devi, the daughter of Eastern Ganga ruler Anangabhima Deva III, during the reign of King Bhanudeva I.

or.question: ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର ଅନନ୍ତ ବାସୁଦେବ ମନ୍ଦିର, ଯାହା ଏହି ସହରର ଏକମାତ୍ର ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଵୈଷ୍ଣବ ମନ୍ଦିର ଅଟେ, ୧୨୭୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦରେ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ କେଉଁ ଗଙ୍ଗ ବଂଶର ରାଜକୁମାରୀଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା?
or.explanation: ଅନନ୍ତ ବାସୁଦେବ ମନ୍ଦିର ୧୨୭୮ ଖ୍ରୀଷ୍ଟାବ୍ଦରେ ପୂର୍ବ ଗଙ୍ଗବଂଶର ରାଜା ଅନଙ୍ଗଭୀମ ଦେବ ତୃତୀୟଙ୍କ କନ୍ୟା ଚନ୍ଦ୍ରିକା ଦେବୀଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଭାନୁଦେବ ପ୍ରଥମଙ୍କ ଶାସନ କାଳରେ ନିର୍ମିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା।

questions.question: The majestic Duduma Waterfall, located in the Koraput district of Odisha, is formed by which of the following rivers?
questions.explanation: The Duduma Waterfall is formed by the Machhkund River. It drops from a height of approximately 157.5 metres (517 feet) and is a vital site for the Machhkund Hydroelectric Project. It is also historically known as 'Matsya Tirtha'.

or.question: ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କୋରାପୁଟ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ 'ଦୁଦୁମା' ଜଳପ୍ରପାତ ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ କେଉଁ ନଦୀ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି?
or.explanation: ଦୁଦୁମା ଜଳପ୍ରପାତ ମାଛକୁଣ୍ଡ ନଦୀ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି। ଏହା ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୫୭.୫ ମିଟର (୫୧୭ ଫୁଟ) ଉଚ୍ଚତାରୁ ପଡ଼ିଥାଏ ଏବଂ ଏହାକୁ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ଭାବରେ 'ମତ୍ସ୍ୟ ତୀର୍ଥ' ବୋଲି ମଧ୍ୟ କୁହାଯାଏ।
